clean_body: the far-right is refusing to investigate... | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. The far-right is refusing to investigate what really happened on January 6th. They’re worried that if we find the truth, Trump and his cronies will be held accountable for spreading lies about the election. | | | | | Trump is going to do everything he can to STOP the truth from coming out. It's clear -- we might never find out what really happened on January 6th... | | | Thanks for responding so quickly! \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. body:

| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001G2pQT1HAtzyx7GuexxCE0ZbkBOKqH_CJwY5lyUy-r8ob-JCVZHuVcrlRuWUYOMJCqHxU9ZBN0FpPvooXhAaECZvW9C5mjBzJ_LMMohn0svPVAsK4dVNAj4eKmiy2y6BKA1pB2dC7RRsSnme-4Z86BH7QBSJq5QOJbLT5TLliw6xLSARwNB1gDv46JYu3RtZDTSfBXNrLumgLEbwSsv6JFw==&c=CovoCpaLkx1AX0lfB5dmIcRBmY1RkJkKp8H8qtFV3NH0DoMOReUy0w==&ch=lQTQm_oo3VuZZT8FoZkeIJnm3T4x9Uu3thAv9b1a3-yLa4YsvrpMRA==)

| Peter, did you see my email endorsing Anthony Sabatini for Congress?
The Swamp is shaking in their boots when they think about the Matt Gaetz caucus growing with an America First Patriot like Anthony Sabatini.
Anthony has gone toe-to-toe with the establishment. He often stands alone in the Florida House against the corrupt political class. He fights and wins against Anthony Fauci and the insane lockdown obsessed bureaucrats. And now he's running to defeat Stephanie Murphy... a Nancy Pelosi and AOC type Marxist... right here in Florida. Anthony has our values. He is a conservative fighter. And now, he needs your support. I told Anthony that I would get 100 America First supporters to chip in by midnight tonight. Can you [chip in](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001G2pQT1HAtzyx7GuexxCE0ZbkBOKqH_CJwY5lyUy-r8ob-JCVZHuVcrlRuWUYOMJCqHxU9ZBN0FpPvooXhAaECZvW9C5mjBzJ_LMMohn0svPVAsK4dVNAj4eKmiy2y6BKA1pB2dC7RRsSnme-4Z86BH7QBSJq5QOJbLT5TLliw6xLSARwNB1gDv46JYu3RtZDTSfBXNrLumgLEbwSsv6JFw==&c=CovoCpaLkx1AX0lfB5dmIcRBmY1RkJkKp8H8qtFV3NH0DoMOReUy0w==&ch=lQTQm_oo3VuZZT8FoZkeIJnm3T4x9Uu3thAv9b1a3-yLa4YsvrpMRA==) $2,900, $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or any amount?
[Click here to rush an urgent donation to Anthony Sabatini's campaign and let's WIN! ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001G2pQT1HAtzyx7GuexxCE0ZbkBOKqH_CJwY5lyUy-r8ob-JCVZHuVcrlRuWUYOMJCqHxU9ZBN0FpPvooXhAaECZvW9C5mjBzJ_LMMohn0svPVAsK4dVNAj4eKmiy2y6BKA1pB2dC7RRsSnme-4Z86BH7QBSJq5QOJbLT5TLliw6xLSARwNB1gDv46JYu3RtZDTSfBXNrLumgLEbwSsv6JFw==&c=CovoCpaLkx1AX0lfB5dmIcRBmY1RkJkKp8H8qtFV3NH0DoMOReUy0w==&ch=lQTQm_oo3VuZZT8FoZkeIJnm3T4x9Uu3thAv9b1a3-yLa4YsvrpMRA==)

\------Begin Forwarded Message------ Subject: Anthony Sabatini = the RINOs worst nightmare From: Congressman Matt Gaetz <[info@mattgaetzforflorida.com](mailto:info@mattgaetzforflorida.com)> Date: Thursday, June 17 at 5:35 PM
---
| Patriot,
I need help in DC. The swamp is out of control and I need PROVEN allies to join me in Congress.
My friend Anthony Sabatini is a proven Trump Republican.
He's stood by my side since day 1 when it comes to putting America First.

* Anthony has a 100% voting record with the American Conservative Union in the Florida state legislature.
* He introduced a bill to name Florida's longest highway the "President Donald J. Trump Highway."
* He battles the RINO establishment and the Marxist democrats day and night... and he wins.
* He is a consistent voice speaking out to end state lockdowns, unmask our kids, and stop vaccine passports.
* He is a proven conservative fighter.

And now he's aiming to join me in Congress representing Florida's 7th District. This is why I'm endorsing Anthony Sabatini for his Congressional campaign against Stephanie "Marxist" Murphy.
I'm asking you, as an America First patriot... to donate directly to Anthony's campaign. You can donate by [clicking on the link here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001G2pQT1HAtzyx7GuexxCE0ZbkBOKqH_CJwY5lyUy-r8ob-JCVZHuVcrlRuWUYOMJCqHxU9ZBN0FpPvooXhAaECZvW9C5mjBzJ_LMMohn0svPVAsK4dVNAj4eKmiy2y6BKA1pB2dC7RRsSnme-4Z86BH7QBSJq5QOJbLT5TLliw6xLSARwNB1gDv46JYu3RtZDVC-OZNVUzSQ=&c=CovoCpaLkx1AX0lfB5dmIcRBmY1RkJkKp8H8qtFV3NH0DoMOReUy0w==&ch=lQTQm_oo3VuZZT8FoZkeIJnm3T4x9Uu3thAv9b1a3-yLa4YsvrpMRA==) 100% of your donation will go directly to Anthony's campaign. No portion will go to RINOs or the party establishment. You see, I hear from candidates all of the time about their intentions to be conservative and to fight for the America First platform. So many Republicans know how to say the right things, but when it comes time for action... when it comes time to fight the liberal media... when it comes time to actually represent WE THE PEOPLE... they are nowhere to be found.
But not Anthony.
He is a proven conservative fighter.
He is battle-tested. And if we're going to win this battle, I need him by my side in Congress. His race is a BATTLEGROUND for Republicans to take back the house. Do not let Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and AOC control the future of America. [Click here to rush an urgent donation to Anthony Sabatini's campaign and let's WIN! ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001G2pQT1HAtzyx7GuexxCE0ZbkBOKqH_CJwY5lyUy-r8ob-JCVZHuVcrlRuWUYOMJCqHxU9ZBN0FpPvooXhAaECZvW9C5mjBzJ_LMMohn0svPVAsK4dVNAj4eKmiy2y6BKA1pB2dC7RRsSnme-4Z86BH7QBSJq5QOJbLT5TLliw6xLSARwNB1gDv46JYu3RtZDVC-OZNVUzSQ=&c=CovoCpaLkx1AX0lfB5dmIcRBmY1RkJkKp8H8qtFV3NH0DoMOReUy0w==&ch=lQTQm_oo3VuZZT8FoZkeIJnm3T4x9Uu3thAv9b1a3-yLa4YsvrpMRA==)

clean_body: The recently elected freshman class in the House of Representatives is made of all star patriots that are working hard to serve their communities. | | | | | | == | Friend, We need strong constitutional conservatives like Kat Cammack in Congress. She's taking the fight to the Radical Left and holding them accountable for their extreme policies. The Republican Freshman Class in the House of Representatives is made up of all-star patriots that are dedicated to serving their communities. == | | | == | I'm a conservative from the great state of North Carolina who wants to put America First and ensure that our great country is not destroyed by extreme policies. What I'm seeing come out of the Biden Administration and Nancy Pelosi's House in terms both economic and national security is startling. We need to put the American people first because that is why we were elected to do this job. Running up taxes to fund social projects or allowing the 'open borders experiment' to occur on our Southern Border is incredibly dangerous and unwise. Derek, expert after expert is making it perfectly clear: Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate has a real shot at becoming Virginia’s next Governor. And with Youngkin outraising (and outspending) the Democrats, his chances are getting better every day.

He bought the Republican primary and now he says he’s willing to spend **$75 million of his own cash to buy the Governor’s office.**

With polls showing this race within the margin of error, it’s critical that we build the strongest grassroots team in the history of Virginia elections.

Now that Ras is officially running for governor of Iowa, **[he wants to continue hearing directly from people like you all across the state.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31156005/291761889/-943775378?refcode=fl_email_su_20210621survey_tr_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWZlMWVmOS05ZmQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-tvMiBhaXNkbYAvXfP8Ai29SfUyaL0ZTIZxizdbVG5s=&emci=89fe1ef9-9fd2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=8afe1ef9-9fd2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21044445)** Ras knows that no matter our differences, we’re all looking for solutions to our common struggles and working to build better lives and a better Iowa. **Ras believes Iowans deserve a government worthy of their work.** We need an economy that gives all Iowans, no matter where they live, access to good paying jobs, that rewards hard work, and gives families a real opportunity to plan for the future and for the next generation. name: Peter Franchot
subject: A defining issue of our time
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Dear Peter,
For many Marylanders, addressing police misconduct is a defining issue of our time. I was an ardent supporter of the Maryland General Assembly’s Maryland Police Accountability Act of 2021, and as your next Governor, I intend to build on it. Under my administration, I’ll support:
*
Ending
all
use
of
no-knock
warrants;
*
Requiring
the
Maryland
Police
Training
and
Standards
Commission
to
decertify
any
officer
who
was
fired
or
resigned
while
under
investigation
for
misconduct
or
excessive
force;
*
Applying
normal
Maryland
Public
Information
Act
standards
to
all
records
on
police
misconduct,
use
of
force,
and
civilian
complaints
against
police
officers;
and
*
Expanding
pending
legislation
that
will
create
independent
review
of
civilian
deaths
involving
police,
to
include
use-of-force
incidents
that
result
in
hospitalization
of
civilians.
If you want to help me in the fight to strengthen our communities and achieve public safety, then will you add your name to sign on to my plan for criminal justice reform? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/KQSjUiQmU0uf8Np6zF_daQ2?source=active]
In addition to restoring trust in our criminal justice system, I’m also going to help reduce crime by addressing the factors that induce crime. Lack of economic opportunity is a major factor that I will address -- not just for first-time offenders, but for returning citizens, whose struggle to find steady employment increases the likelihood for recidivism.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/KQSjUiQmU0uf8Np6zF_daQ2?source=active [https://secure.ngpvan.com/KQSjUiQmU0uf8Np6zF_daQ2?source=active]I have a bold goal to reduce the recidivism rate by at least 50% by 2030, and as part of my plan to do that, I’m going to offer returning citizens training and placement in a competitive industry that pays family-supporting wages. I’ll also create a statewide version of D.C.’s Office of Returning Citizens Affairs to streamline the navigation of essential state services.
Additionally, I am committed to treating addiction as the public health crisis that it is -- not deserving of punishment, but of treatment. I will pilot a statewide, pre-arrest diversion program for arrestees who suffer from addiction.
Taken together, my planned reforms will help strengthen our communities by restoring trust in our criminal justice system, saving money by ending failed practices, and reducing crime. If you want to help make this vision for our future a reality, then add your name to support my plans for criminal justice reform. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/KQSjUiQmU0uf8Np6zF_daQ2?source=active]
Thank you,

clean_body: [ Peter, For many Marylanders, addressing police misconduct is a defining issue of our time. I was an ardent supporter of the Maryland General Assembly’s Maryland Police Accountability Act of 2021, and as your next Governor, I intend to build on it. Under my administration, I’ll support: Ending all use of no-knock warrants; Requiring the Maryland Police Training and Standards Commission to decertify any officer who was fired or resigned while under investigation for misconduct or excessive force; Applying normal Maryland Public Information Act standards to all records on police misconduct, use of force, and civilian complaints against police officers; and Expanding pending legislation that will create independent review of civilian deaths involving police, to include use-of-force incidents that result in hospitalization of civilians. If you want to help me in the fight to strengthen our communities and achieve public safety, then will you add your name to sign on to my plan for criminal justice reform? name: Mark Warner HQ
subject: Voter suppression bills in almost all fifty states
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Help elect Democrats who’ll protect the right to vote

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31158785/291769169/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmYwNDJjNy1hMmQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O_LNE2pfcOdvsjuTgN1_Q2w2Fxml2ULzw5PC8pxBMCs=&emci=663c408f-aecf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=8bf042c7-a2d2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4568237)

| | | **''After defeating restrictive voting bill, Texas Democrats send loud message: 'We need Congress to do their part'''**
_— The Washington Post_
**[Pitch in to elect Democratic senators who’ll protect the right to vote](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31158786/291769170/1413210932?refcode=ris_20210621_e_f_us_na_na_votersuppressresendnd&refcode2=cont&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmYwNDJjNy1hMmQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O_LNE2pfcOdvsjuTgN1_Q2w2Fxml2ULzw5PC8pxBMCs=)**
---
Derek,

When Texas Republicans tried to jam a partisan voter suppression bill through the state House, Democrats walked off the floor and killed the bill. Afterward, they declared that **“We need Congress to do their part” and pass legislation to safeguard the right to vote.**

And Congress _must_ step up, because voting rights are under relentless assault — and not just in Texas.

You’ve no doubt heard about the voter suppression law passed in Georgia, but the same thing just happened in Florida. There, Gov. Ron DeSantis signed a bill that criminalized giving food and water to Floridians in line to vote, limited ballot drop boxes, and created onerous regulations for anyone who wanted to vote by mail in future elections.

In total, as of mid-May, state-level Republicans have introduced _**389 bills**_ in almost all _**fifty states.**_

**[But Mark Warner and this team are _fighting_ back. The Forward Together PAC, which Mark created in 2006 to support Democratic candidates in Virginia and around the country, is working to fight voter suppression by electing Democratic senators who will protect the right to vote. Can you rush a donation to the Forward Together PAC?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31158787/291769171/1413210932?refcode=ris_20210621_e_f_us_na_na_votersuppressresendnd&refcode2=cont&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmYwNDJjNy1hMmQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O_LNE2pfcOdvsjuTgN1_Q2w2Fxml2ULzw5PC8pxBMCs=)**

Voter suppression is **wrong,** and it doesn't just hurt the people in the states where it happens. That's because who gets to vote in a state like Texas, Florida, Georgia, and Arizona could determine the outcome of a national election ... like the 2024 presidential election.

That's why it's essential that we move _quickly_ to stop voter suppression. In the Senate, Mark is working to pass voting rights legislation — including the For the People Act — which would prohibit many state-level voter suppression laws.

**[But this important work will be in jeopardy if we lose our Democratic Senate majority in 2022. Your urgent donation will help make sure that _doesn’t happen_.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31158788/291769172/1413210932?refcode=ris_20210621_e_f_us_na_na_votersuppressresendnd&refcode2=cont&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmYwNDJjNy1hMmQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O_LNE2pfcOdvsjuTgN1_Q2w2Fxml2ULzw5PC8pxBMCs=)**

Thank you,
Team Warner

[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31158789/291769173/1413210932?refcode=ris_20210621_e_f_us_na_na_votersuppressresendnd&refcode2=cont&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmYwNDJjNy1hMmQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O_LNE2pfcOdvsjuTgN1_Q2w2Fxml2ULzw5PC8pxBMCs=)

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action for the week of June 21st: CORRUPT POLITICIANS ACT UP FOR VOTE!
body:
| |
---
This week, the **national** action must be focused on the Democrats’ efforts to take over and corrupt our elections – they are moving the bill now; see below for details. ***** The **cloture vote** is expected to occur at a _time to be determined_ on** Tuesday, June 22*** This means that call need to happen right at the start of the week, on Monday and again on Tuesday!

The **local** action must be focused on getting ready for the June 29th sign/flag waving events and for the July school board meeting.

Action items for this week include:
* **National: Stop the Democrats from taking over our elections**

* **Local: Plan your sign waving and get your research done about local government**

* **Reminders and other sign up forms**

See below for details!

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
Last week, Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer announced plans to force a vote on S1 — the Senate version of the “For The People Act,” better known as the Corrupt Politicians Act.

Republican senators swiftly responded taking to floor to fight back against the bill calling it the “Fund the Politicians Act.”

Sen. Joni Ernst of Iowa slammed the bill, saying:

“Instead of addressing the important issues that are on the minds of my fellow Iowans — like the rising cost of gasoline, bread, milk, and all sorts of household goods — this bill literally takes money out of the paychecks of working Americans and puts it into the campaign coffers of Washington politicians...”

**NATIONAL
Call Your Senators and Demand They Stop the Takeover of Our Elections**
The Democrats are trying to pull a fast one on the American people. They know that S.1, what we call “The Corrupt Politicians Act,” is very unpopular. So, they are trying to sneak a replacement bill through, hoping you won’t notice. S.2093 is the replacement bill, and they are, in fact, almost identical. [You can read through the major problems with **_both_** bills on our website.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTcyLWJlY2VjMTJkOThiYzQxODE5NzdlNmFjNGFjZTRiOTdk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcC1jb3JydXB0LXBvbGl0aWNpYW5zP21pZD00Mzk1MyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVEjaG9ycmlibGVz&K=JcjCoZQo2URqVy9CR1XzGg) **In a nutshell, both bills will allow Democrats to take over elections in every state in America. It’s their way of making all the shady, corrupt things they did in 2020 permanent.**

So, here is what they’re doing with S.2093: Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer has now filed cloture on the motion to proceed (MTP) to **Schumer / Klobuchar / Merkley** **S.2093** , “For the People Act of 2021.”

They are using Rule 14 to bring the bill straight to floor without going through the committee. Getting cloture will allow them to begin debate. Every step forward, as we learned with Obamacare, is dangerous. **We do not want this cloture vote to pass!**

We don’t know where Sen. Manchin stands on this, and it will require 60 votes, but one thought is that the Democrats are trying to use this vote to force Sen. Manchin to support eliminating the filibuster.

See the details about the bills below if you would like to know more about why S.2093 is no different than S.1, and therefore Republicans and Sen. Manchin should not support it!

Republicans especially, and Sen. Manchin, definitely need to hear from us, because we do not want cloture to pass, so please make those calls! If you are calling Sen. Manchin, be sure to also urge him to stay strong on the filibuster and to keep the filibuster!

**Action: Call your Senators and tell them to vote no on S.2093 and vote no on cloture on motion to proceed on S.2093.**

**LOCAL
Organize Your Sign/Flag Waving Event & Research Your School Board
**
Our [United We Stand sign/flag waving guide](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTcyLWJlY2VjMTJkOThiYzQxODE5NzdlNmFjNGFjZTRiOTdk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZm9ybXMvdXdzLXNpZ24td2F2aW5nLz9taWQ9NDM5NTMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=JFNiPUiRb8FOKBPhSLdCcg) is now posted! We have a really easy step-by-step process to follow to organize your own (hint: it’s super easy!), and we have sign suggestions as well. If you haven’t made up your mind to put one together, please seriously consider doing so! Our fellow Americans need some hope and American pride, and it’s up to us to give it to them!

Also, check out our new [center for National Attend a School Board Meeting Month](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTcyLWJlY2VjMTJkOThiYzQxODE5NzdlNmFjNGFjZTRiOTdk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZm9ybXMvYXR0ZW5kLXNjaG9vbC1ib2FyZC8_bWlkPTQzOTUzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=-nAI_NQ5E5A1KbYpuOBi4g)! We will have our toolkit posted soon to help you navigate this process of working with or confronting your school board. **Right now, you can sign up to commit to attend the July meeting, and I am asking you to make that commitment today!**

Once the toolkit is posted, we will let you know, but in the meantime, please look over [this list of items to research](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTcyLWJlY2VjMTJkOThiYzQxODE5NzdlNmFjNGFjZTRiOTdk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvY2FsbHMtdG8tYWN0aW9uL3Jlc2VhcmNoaW5nLXlvdXItbG9jYWwtZ292ZXJubWVudD9taWQ9NDM5NTMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=XsdxQtQB3vPjzwEfobDH5g) so you are prepared. You need to know things like, when they are meeting in July, and where. Get that info now since it is still only June.

**Lastly, you do not need to have children in the local public schools to participate**! You can have kids in private school, have no children, or maybe your children are now adults and no longer in school. You pay taxes to support public schools and you care about what the schools are teaching the future leaders of America. So, get in there and let your voice be heard!

Last week, Joe Biden returned from his first Presidential trip overseas... from the G7 Summit to a meeting with Russian President Vladimir Putin, Joe Biden embarrassed the United States on a global stage everywhere he went.

From video of him being laughed at by other world leaders to reports of him not being able to keep up, Joe Biden sent a message of weakness to our allies, as well as our adversaries.

In the words of Senators Cruz, Johnson and Barrasso, following Biden's summit with Vladimir Putin:

"President Biden is sending a message of weakness and appeasement to our adversaries, encouraging and emboldening them. It is precisely the wrong message to send...”

At a time where our nation needs to project strength and confidence, our leader projected weakness and incompetence.

clean_body: | | This week, the national action must be focused on the Democrats’ efforts to take over and corrupt our elections – they are moving the bill now; see below for details. *** The cloture vote is expected to occur at a time to be determined on Tuesday, June 22* This means that call need to happen right at the start of the week, on Monday and again on Tuesday! The local action must be focused on getting ready for the June 29th sign/flag waving events and for the July school board meeting. Action items for this week include: National: Stop the Democrats from taking over our elections Local: Plan your sign waving and get your research done about local government Reminders and other sign up forms See below for details! Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it. | Last week, Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer announced plans to force a vote on S1 — the Senate version of the “For The People Act,” better known as the Corrupt Politicians Act. Republican senators swiftly responded taking to floor to fight back against the bill calling it the “Fund the Politicians Act.” Sen. Joni Ernst of Iowa slammed the bill, saying: “Instead of addressing the important issues that are on the minds of my fellow Iowans — like the rising cost of gasoline, bread, milk, and all sorts of household goods — this bill literally takes money out of the paychecks of working Americans and puts it into the campaign coffers of Washington politicians...” | NATIONAL Call Your Senators and Demand They Stop the Takeover of Our Elections The Democrats are trying to pull a fast one on the American people. They know that S.1, what we call “The Corrupt Politicians Act,” is very unpopular. So, they are trying to sneak a replacement bill through, hoping you won’t notice. S.2093 is the replacement bill, and they are, in fact, almost identical. In a nutshell, both bills will allow Democrats to take over elections in every state in America. It’s their way of making all the shady, corrupt things they did in 2020 permanent. So, here is what they’re doing with S.2093: Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer has now filed cloture on the motion to proceed (MTP) to Schumer / Klobuchar / Merkley S.2093 , “For the People Act of 2021.” They are using Rule 14 to bring the bill straight to floor without going through the committee. Getting cloture will allow them to begin debate. Every step forward, as we learned with Obamacare, is dangerous. We do not want this cloture vote to pass! We don’t know where Sen. Manchin stands on this, and it will require 60 votes, but one thought is that the Democrats are trying to use this vote to force Sen. Manchin to support eliminating the filibuster. See the details about the bills below if you would like to know more about why S.2093 is no different than S.1, and therefore Republicans and Sen. Manchin should not support it! Republicans especially, and Sen. Manchin, definitely need to hear from us, because we do not want cloture to pass, so please make those calls! If you are calling Sen. Manchin, be sure to also urge him to stay strong on the filibuster and to keep the filibuster! Action: Call your Senators and tell them to vote no on S.2093 and vote no on cloture on motion to proceed on S.2093. Resources to read before you call, if you haven’t read them yet. about the defending the filibuster | A good friend of Tea Party Patriots, Ned Ryun, has just announced the release of his new book: The Adversaries: A Story of Boston and Bunker Hill In Ryun's own words, it is about "principled defiance in the face of overpowering and arbitrary authoritarianism, which makes it a story for all time." | LOCAL Organize Your Sign/Flag Waving Event & Research Your School Board Our is now posted! We have a really easy step-by-step process to follow to organize your own (hint: it’s super easy!), and we have sign suggestions as well. If you haven’t made up your mind to put one together, please seriously consider doing so! Our fellow Americans need some hope and American pride, and it’s up to us to give it to them! Also, check out our new ! We will have our toolkit posted soon to help you navigate this process of working with or confronting your school board. Right now, you can sign up to commit to attend the July meeting, and I am asking you to make that commitment today! Once the toolkit is posted, we will let you know, but in the meantime, please look over so you are prepared. You need to know things like, when they are meeting in July, and where. Get that info now since it is still only June. Lastly, you do not need to have children in the local public schools to participate! You can have kids in private school, have no children, or maybe your children are now adults and no longer in school. You pay taxes to support public schools and you care about what the schools are teaching the future leaders of America. So, get in there and let your voice be heard! | Last week, Joe Biden returned from his first Presidential trip overseas... from the G7 Summit to a meeting with Russian President Vladimir Putin, Joe Biden embarrassed the United States on a global stage everywhere he went. From video of him being laughed at by other world leaders to reports of him not being able to keep up, Joe Biden sent a message of weakness to our allies, as well as our adversaries. In the words of Senators Cruz, Johnson and Barrasso, following Biden's summit with Vladimir Putin: "President Biden is sending a message of weakness and appeasement to our adversaries, encouraging and emboldening them. It is precisely the wrong message to send...” At a time where our nation needs to project strength and confidence, our leader projected weakness and incompetence. | Reminders: Sign up forms and research to do Eternal Vigilance Project If you haven’t yet signed up for the Eternal Vigilance Project, please sign up this week! There are two levels available. Sign up at the links below. | Running for Local Office If you’re interested in running for local office, especially if you’d like to run in the 2022 election, now is the time to let us know because you must get trained in 2021! | Nationwide Summer Events The grassroots approved the upcoming events listed below, and the sooner you get yours planned, the better your events will be! letting us know whether you will organize or attend these summer events. | Watch The Red White + Blueprint docuseries | | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. © 2021 80 M St SE, First Floor, Washington, D.C. 20003 |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jim=20Jordan=20=2D=20House=20Freedom=20Fund?=
subject: Biden's Inflation Tax
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
We need a conservative House to end Biden's Inflation Tax. | | | | |
---
Can't read this? [Click here.](https://mailchi.mp/housefreedomfund/bidens-inflation-tax?e=b2c16e6198)
---
| | | |
---
| | | | Peter:

Joe Biden ran for president, promising never to raise taxes on the middle class. But it’s a promise he has already broken – _**by unleashing inflation on our economy**_ like we have not seen in decades.

Look at your local grocery store, hardware store, or gas station. The story is the same:

• Steel and lumber prices: _**UP**_
• Beef, poultry, and seafood prices: _**UP**_
• Fruit and vegetable prices: _**UP**_
• Coffee, cereal, and orange juice prices: _**UP**_
• And gas prices: _**WAY UP**_

This is not an accident.

_This is what happens when Democrats borrow and print trillions of dollars we don’t have to spend on things we don’t need._

Elites can afford inflation – what’s a few more bucks to John Kerry on his next private jet flight, or Nancy Pelosi getting her hair done? It’s everyone else who gets hammered. When the price of fuel and food goes up, working families get squeezed: maybe no camp or soccer this summer for the kids; maybe no traveling home for Thanksgiving; maybe no Christmas bonuses at work.

**Inflation is not just a hidden tax – it’s a sneak attack against working, saving, and sacrificing for one’s family.**

Every one of Joe Biden’s trillion-dollar spending bills triggering the new inflation originates in the U.S. House of Representatives. The only way to get prices under control is to take control of the House away from Biden, Pelosi, and “The Squad.”

[**I’m writing today asking you to help the House Freedom Fund.**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=ad9724da12&e=b2c16e6198)

HFF is the only political organization in America exclusively dedicated to helping battle-ready, principled conservatives win primary and general elections for the U.S. House. And these leaders must overcome the twin opponents of the woke left AND the GOP elite.

**You see, HFF candidates don't just have the letter “R” by their name; they're fighters, willing to take on the Democrats, the Swamp, their own party, China, Big Tech, the corporate media, Critical Race Theory, and Planned Parenthood.**

The 2022 election cycle will determine control of the House heading into the 2024 presidential election. It will decide issues like election integrity, border security, crime, and, yes, the inflation tax Joe Biden has loosed on working families.

[**Please help secure America's future by making a one-time or recurring donation today!**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=508a4eccf0&e=b2c16e6198)

With your contribution to the House Freedom Fund, we can help conservative leaders like U.S. Reps. _**Scott Perry**_ (R-PA), _**Lauren Boebert**_ (R-CO), and _**Yvette Harrell**_ (R-NM). Your support will also help us win special elections like the one in Texas where conservative _**Susan Wright**_ (R-TX) faces a RINO in the primary runoff this July.

**The only way to end Biden’s Inflation Tax is to end his spending and debt spree, and the only way to do that is to fill the House with conservative fighters.**

[**Please make a generous contribution to HFF today – for the candidates we need and the future we want.**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=813f89616e&e=b2c16e6198)

clean_body: We need a conservative House to end Biden's Inflation Tax. | | | | | Can't read this? | | | | | | | | Peter: Joe Biden ran for president, promising never to raise taxes on the middle class. But it’s a promise he has already broken – by unleashing inflation on our economy like we have not seen in decades. Look at your local grocery store, hardware store, or gas station. The story is the same: • Steel and lumber prices: UP • Beef, poultry, and seafood prices: UP • Fruit and vegetable prices: UP • Coffee, cereal, and orange juice prices: UP • And gas prices: WAY UP This is not an accident. This is what happens when Democrats borrow and print trillions of dollars we don’t have to spend on things we don’t need. Elites can afford inflation – what’s a few more bucks to John Kerry on his next private jet flight, or Nancy Pelosi getting her hair done? It’s everyone else who gets hammered. When the price of fuel and food goes up, working families get squeezed: maybe no camp or soccer this summer for the kids; maybe no traveling home for Thanksgiving; maybe no Christmas bonuses at work. Inflation is not just a hidden tax – it’s a sneak attack against working, saving, and sacrificing for one’s family. Every one of Joe Biden’s trillion-dollar spending bills triggering the new inflation originates in the U.S. House of Representatives. The only way to get prices under control is to take control of the House away from Biden, Pelosi, and “The Squad.” HFF is the only political organization in America exclusively dedicated to helping battle-ready, principled conservatives win primary and general elections for the U.S. House. And these leaders must overcome the twin opponents of the woke left AND the GOP elite. You see, HFF candidates don't just have the letter “R” by their name; they're fighters, willing to take on the Democrats, the Swamp, their own party, China, Big Tech, the corporate media, Critical Race Theory, and Planned Parenthood. The 2022 election cycle will determine control of the House heading into the 2024 presidential election. It will decide issues like election integrity, border security, crime, and, yes, the inflation tax Joe Biden has loosed on working families. With your contribution to the House Freedom Fund, we can help conservative leaders like U.S. Reps. Scott Perry (R-PA), Lauren Boebert (R-CO), and Yvette Harrell (R-NM). Your support will also help us win special elections like the one in Texas where conservative Susan Wright (R-TX) faces a RINO in the primary runoff this July. The only way to end Biden’s Inflation Tax is to end his spending and debt spree, and the only way to do that is to fill the House with conservative fighters. Thank you for considering this request and doing so much to help fight for conservative leadership in Washington. name: Team Fair Fight Action
subject: The U.S. Senate plans to vote on S 1 THIS WEEK!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
S 1 would protect the freedom to vote in all 50 states. Urge your Senators to help defend democracy today!

Fair Fight |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31163244/291787157/1793776944?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDBmYzU0My1hZWQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0y1zEsVCm20clAUzQ7XG4CP-uo8QucVsTuAFBmIXJos=&emci=f2df8e77-a4d2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=cd0fc543-aed2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277)

| | Friend- As you know, this Hot Call Summer we are encouraging each and every American to contact their U.S. Senators every single day to demand they pass S 1, the For the People Act. You’ve been working hard all month long lighting up the phone lines, and the time has finally come: **the U.S. Senate is expected to vote on the For the People Act THIS WEEK!** Whether you’ve already made dozens of calls or are about to pick up the phone to dial your Senators for the first time today, we need your help! Your Senators need to hear from YOU about supporting the For the People Act—no matter who you are or which state you live in. The freedom to vote is under attack in your state and across the country. In the last six months alone, [**over 400 anti-voter bills have been introduced in nearly every state legislature—disproportionately targeting communities of color**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31163245/291787158/266493267?ex_cid=story-twitter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDBmYzU0My1hZWQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0y1zEsVCm20clAUzQ7XG4CP-uo8QucVsTuAFBmIXJos=&emci=f2df8e77-a4d2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=cd0fc543-aed2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277). We’re asking folks in your state to push back against these threats to our democracy by encouraging your Senators to pass the For the People Act. S 1 will protect the freedom to vote on a federal level by establishing baseline national standards for voting access, regardless of political party, race, or zip code. It will help to protect your freedom to vote from the onslaught of anti-voter bills Republicans are pushing to try and stifle the political power of you, your neighbors, your friends, and your fellow Americans. It’s up to all of us to keep doing our part to protect our democracy. Here’s how:
* **Call your Senators at 888-453-3211** every day this week and demand that they pass S 1, the For the People Act!
* Advocates in your state are texting voters and encouraging them to call their Senators. **Join them by signing up for one of our textbank trainings[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31163246/291787159/-2099015820?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDBmYzU0My1hZWQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0y1zEsVCm20clAUzQ7XG4CP-uo8QucVsTuAFBmIXJos=&emci=f2df8e77-a4d2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=cd0fc543-aed2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277)!**

To learn more about the For the People Act, visit [StopJimCrow2.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31163247/291787160/768938118?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDBmYzU0My1hZWQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0y1zEsVCm20clAUzQ7XG4CP-uo8QucVsTuAFBmIXJos=&emci=f2df8e77-a4d2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=cd0fc543-aed2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277). Thank you for your partnership in defending our democracy.

—Team Fair Fight Action |

clean_body: S 1 would protect the freedom to vote in all 50 states. Urge your Senators to help defend democracy today! Fair Fight | | | Friend- As you know, this Hot Call Summer we are encouraging each and every American to contact their U.S. Senators every single day to demand they pass S 1, the For the People Act. You’ve been working hard all month long lighting up the phone lines, and the time has finally come: the U.S. Senate is expected to vote on the For the People Act THIS WEEK! Whether you’ve already made dozens of calls or are about to pick up the phone to dial your Senators for the first time today, we need your help! Your Senators need to hear from YOU about supporting the For the People Act—no matter who you are or which state you live in. The freedom to vote is under attack in your state and across the country. In the last six months alone, . We’re asking folks in your state to push back against these threats to our democracy by encouraging your Senators to pass the For the People Act. S 1 will protect the freedom to vote on a federal level by establishing baseline national standards for voting access, regardless of political party, race, or zip code. It will help to protect your freedom to vote from the onslaught of anti-voter bills Republicans are pushing to try and stifle the political power of you, your neighbors, your friends, and your fellow Americans. It’s up to all of us to keep doing our part to protect our democracy. Here’s how: Call your Senators at 888-453-3211 every day this week and demand that they pass S 1, the For the People Act! Advocates in your state are texting voters and encouraging them to call their Senators. Join them by signing up for one of our textbank trainings! To learn more about the For the People Act, visit . Thank you for your partnership in defending our democracy. —Team Fair Fight Action | ---|---|--- | 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-430 Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2021 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. Contributions to Fair Fight Action are not tax-deductible. | | Paid for by Fair Fight Action

name: Chuck Grassley
subject: Liars!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc
body:
Democrats falsely smeared Amy Coney Barrett

| [](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/10075484/224717773/203543/1/)
---

Friend,

This is about as surprising as turning on the History Channel and not seeing any History, but Democrats just got caught red-handed lying about Justice Amy Coney Barrett.

Despite their conspiracy theories and fear mongering over her nomination last year, she has been an exemplary Justice who upholds the Constitution, Call me old-fashioned, but that's exactly the kind of person we need on the Supreme Court, and **the Democrats ' smears and lies about her show me they can't be trusted to pick judges that will fairly interpret the Constitution. **

**[Donate today to help me Take Back the Senate for Republicans and protect an independent judiciary.](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/10075484/224717773/203543/2/)**

I presided over the confirmation hearings of Justice Kavanaugh, and they lied about him too, smearing him with accusations that I can't put in an email. I fought back against this shameful partisan garbage and won, but now that they have the Senate Majority, I need your help to fight back and make sure we win back a Republican Majority.

**Democrats are champing at the bit to undo the work we did under President Trump to confirm judges who know their job is to interpret the law, not write it. It 's a power play to take power from the people and put it in the hands of activist, unelected judges.** They're even planning to spend hundreds of millions of dollars to expand their Senate Majority and consolidate their power over nominations.

**We can 't let that happen.**

**[Can you chip in to help me make sure we take back the Senate and restore common sense to Washington?](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/10075484/224717773/203543/3/)**

Keep in touch,

[](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/10075484/224717773/203543/4/)
Senator Chuck Grassley

| Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc.

name: Team Greitens
subject: ICYMI: Kansas City Star Calls Eric Greitens Most Pro-Trump Candidate, Clear Frontrunner in 2022 Senate Race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
The Kansas City Star recently published that former US Navy SEAL & Missouri Governor Eric Greitens occupies the "Trump lane."
---
| | | | | |
---
| ICYMI: Kansas City Star Calls Eric Greitens the Most Pro-Trump Candidate, Says Greitens is Clear Frontrunner in 2022 Senate Race
---
| St. Louis, MO. -- The Kansas City Star recently published that former US Navy SEAL & Missouri Governor Eric Greitens occupies the "Trump lane."
In the article, The Star writes, "the question of who is the strongest competitor against Greitens is likely to remain unsettled for some time."
Polling by President Trump's pollster found that Greitens leads big in the GOP primary to fill Missouri's open U.S. Senate seat. The poll also found that Greitens leads big among voters who most strongly support President Donald Trump.
[Missouri GOP Senate candidates fight to keep Greitens from owning the 'Trump lane'](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f2Fgj8ms95OKn1bSCvag5WlNVPR4iEmoZlWRy21wCC3fx2MlaPbdkRf5WonvLfC8W_yBhZGz1cKnz0mk2Pm1vxnEJchtdA77dOzD8qV51xzkA9tMZbijgkw_MjePHxJ0rCLGaPcW4MIO8Jd4ZYSxNZTh7MzhovArtleTr_E8xEhBhudi7oblX3s7qN-7mZqO6NWYUABxV3fnxrUNcfQVYQ==&c=iI4ix5FtvKtFmynmf41_trEx_C9EMQMrTpbZMUPJTnlrmLK61denhg==&ch=fqmm-m4djAqc4HRo2qUe91lMkyVnrPl9up3RRqbiOKD2XE1KKzSVKw==)
The article notes that "Greitens has maintained a near-constant presence on right-wing, pro-Trump media, including hosting a show on the Real America's Voice TV network and announcing his candidacy on Fox News."
"Even a blind squirrel finds a nut once in a while," said Dylan Johnson, Greitens' campaign manager on the Kansas City Star's analysis.
On Sunday, Greitens was attacked by Chuck Todd on NBC's Meet the Press for visiting the Arizona audit of the 2020 presidential election. Todd also featured Florida Governor Ron DeSantis' opposition to critical race theory and Texas Governor Greg Abbott's position on border security.
[Meet the Press' Chuck Todd Attempts to Mock Greitens for Touring AZ Audit, DeSantis for Opposing CRT](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f2Fgj8ms95OKn1bSCvag5WlNVPR4iEmoZlWRy21wCC3fx2MlaPbdkRf5WonvLfC8y9bomkgfUexN8efGKN_5YQC7peYnbvD0cOJ7FvzUqdtVwOOWo-2qNTi9meEJ8JKBTykqyUDwTjcyxYDfuxVeN_Zu5xbXMpmDe_fYshlhoR7RCVb2OCjsKA==&c=iI4ix5FtvKtFmynmf41_trEx_C9EMQMrTpbZMUPJTnlrmLK61denhg==&ch=fqmm-m4djAqc4HRo2qUe91lMkyVnrPl9up3RRqbiOKD2XE1KKzSVKw==)

The poll also found that Greitens leads big among voters who most strongly support President Donald Trump. == The article notes that "Greitens has maintained a near-constant presence on right-wing, pro-Trump media, including hosting a show on the Real America's Voice TV network and announcing his candidacy on Fox News." "Even a blind squirrel finds a nut once in a while," said Dylan Johnson, Greitens' campaign manager on the Kansas City Star's analysis. On Sunday, Greitens was attacked by Chuck Todd on NBC's Meet the Press for visiting the Arizona audit of the 2020 presidential election. Todd also featured Florida Governor Ron DeSantis' opposition to critical race theory and Texas Governor Greg Abbott's position on border security. == | == | ### | | | | FOLLOW US == == == == | | | | Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate | PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 | | | Sent by mailto:press@ericgreitens.com powered by

name: Ralph Northam
subject: The Republicans will stop at nothing to flip this seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qR9lBBkU7oXp1MIL_9WhQzzd2V8DkQtqfYmPl3dsONQ=/2Y9aP1u0vdal5TmZL4fkkzcYupd_tcWnmVQac8UEwD0=)
---
Friend, As Governor, I'm working hard to ensure that Virginia Democrats win up and down the ticket this year, which is why I wanted to tell you about my good friend Delegate Alex Askew. Over the years that we've worked together, I've seen firsthand that Alex is fearless and passionate in his pursuit of increasing access to high-quality and affordable healthcare, improving public education, and protecting our environment. He's not afraid to roll up his sleeves and get to work on issues that matter most to Virginians -- big or small. But friend, the fact is that Virginia Beach is a top target for Republicans this cycle. Politicians like Glenn Youngkin know that the Beach is a critical part of their path to victory, and the national GOP is sending in their biggest names to seal the deal. If we want to ensure continued progress on the issues that matter most, it is critical that Alex is reelected to the House of Delegates in November. [Will you join me in supporting his campaign to maintain our Democratic Majority in the House of Delegates?](https://act.myngp.com/el/qR9lBBkU7oXp1MIL_9WhQzzd2V8DkQtqfYmPl3dsONQ=/RBhvgjxAOVnon0v0yzaf5pXex3XkBQI74c8EXAOgzkI=) This year is about so much more than the top of the ticket. If we're going to continue to push our Commonwealth forward, we need strong leaders at every level of government. That only happens if we protect incumbents like Alex Askew in battleground districts like his. [I know that he can't do it alone; if you can, please chip in to help re-elect Alex.](https://act.myngp.com/el/qR9lBBkU7oXp1MIL_9WhQzzd2V8DkQtqfYmPl3dsONQ=/RBhvgjxAOVnon0v0yzaf5pXex3XkBQI74c8EXAOgzkI=) Thank you for your continued commitment to this fight. Take care, Ralph Northam

name: Action Alert (LeftAction)
subject: Tell the Senate: End the filibuster
body:
This may finally be the moment where we can end it. With Senate Republicans blocking Senator Joe Manchin's voting rights proposal, frustration may finally lead Senate Democrats to unite against the filibuster.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
# [SIGN THE PETITION: TELL THE SENATE TO END THE FILIBUSTER](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8c7154e5-54b6-44ac-b7f2-2598c3c60882/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Hi Friend, It’s absurd and undemocratic that 41 senators can overrule the will of 59. And that wildly popular legislation is blocked by an intransigent minority. **[This may finally be the moment where we can end it](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3b53347f-95d3-45fb-b787-ac414cf78991/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)****.** With Senate Republicans blocking Senator Joe Manchin's voting rights proposal, frustration may finally lead Senate Democrats to unite against the filibuster.

[**Sign the petition, and tell the Senate to end the filibuster.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4db6775b-e3d5-4804-be47-e0d99ec45963/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Folks, midterm elections haven’t looked good for Senate Democrats in the past few cycles. Take a look:
* In 2018, Democrats lost 2 Senate seats
* In 2014, Democrats lost 9 Senate seats
* In 2010, Democrats lost 6 Senate seats

name: Greater Georgia
subject: ICYMI: GREATER GEORGIA RESULTS HIGHLIGHTED IN WASHINGTON EXAMINER
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, JUNE 21, 2021
ICYMI: GREATER GEORGIA RESULTS HIGHLIGHTED IN WASHINGTON EXAMINER
ATLANTA - In case you missed it, the Washington Examiner recently [highlighted](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k0ZjmowZ5eTlvPISoqwHeOoEcW-LDw1x3wIfeKD_ibNRf9_VdKkIJNjJfJNWCVWbcwYyTEHbFTqTG_rxEo1xiZXDZD26PlSSaE9crGNpqz_JmNgAhl7v6tCaP7jvguRfvJEAupABB2fXiycFkDU7b7Q2DYHXnVJrMKqAAmyllAC3WoOiybha-RzP2pVmK1IVChSIOsz_AsZ9GECKi8KykOmZv23Q5YP9&c=Hj54kEc7P1IEp4Bwm2Pibs5VRR643-efF5E0BHfrbhtqj6k3yKy7eA==&ch=ZduyoS0ZcTYRsEEFXRaVYBjIZweY8K1qax_k31DE569hAAGk0zT_Hg==) Greater Georgia's record of [results](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k0ZjmowZ5eTlvPISoqwHeOoEcW-LDw1x3wIfeKD_ibNRf9_VdKkIJNjJfJNWCVWbgsGKcItPLMAUqxWMxwPfB56ju0mR--KAu_GQJNxP1KrX9yrP3Gf0_0kqMnt-TcOFFKx-SkPWvm0zofMSqpHDNbViDKXS3332zsk78XZZDv1oW21DZkGFsPO9tT2XzeUkf0bWsAqEC4Yw8d17YNRIm6yM0m6BDhK5i0oWfTMI4aYJuugnKGJx2Wdoa_r42fjzYOhtPKpmB92ed4N3KfABXDn_urKquqRZ&c=Hj54kEc7P1IEp4Bwm2Pibs5VRR643-efF5E0BHfrbhtqj6k3yKy7eA==&ch=ZduyoS0ZcTYRsEEFXRaVYBjIZweY8K1qax_k31DE569hAAGk0zT_Hg==) since its launch just four months ago. In a story last week, the Examiner discussed the group's [successful efforts](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k0ZjmowZ5eTlvPISoqwHeOoEcW-LDw1x3wIfeKD_ibNRf9_VdKkIJGED6ph6EWFiB-rsXPVXJEuIQ42AQX9mx-dURtHEfPiL0X9qLIu_WBQlJ96VvCwEe_CYTH-7zMo9R2yppuRnR_LbzerEuJNCldvTCpz0-ZlsoO6l56wZr3ygDBv81s3GWpqSvA_sgiLyGDtZuSHAMcZLEh7eajxMVlme_uSb5zv0bCfVuT3yRVfJIqWb5g0RojDT36oliWos-YpvYMPBNjlWdnA-wccqt2PWRtOzTCwp&c=Hj54kEc7P1IEp4Bwm2Pibs5VRR643-efF5E0BHfrbhtqj6k3yKy7eA==&ch=ZduyoS0ZcTYRsEEFXRaVYBjIZweY8K1qax_k31DE569hAAGk0zT_Hg==) to register thousands of new conservative voters, mobilize hundreds of thousands more, and fight for election integrity - including in the State House District 34 Special Election in Cobb County. From the Washington Examiner:
Kelly Loeffler says her project to boost Georgia conservative turnout is already showing results
Just four months after launching her Greater Georgia project, former Republican Sen. Kelly Loeffler says that her efforts to rebuild conservative enthusiasm and win back voters disillusioned with the election process in her state are already showing results.
In a [special election](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k0ZjmowZ5eTlvPISoqwHeOoEcW-LDw1x3wIfeKD_ibNRf9_VdKkIJNjJfJNWCVWbLFpR5y1prp33U90GsxVqvbeMVkmOuinZ0YT17FpcSyyezU_Yc_g4Lo_8EQzzCscG7KVovDqvXa5ZAJfw_aupFNS8If9RgVJFVXdYTvyicOwuujEJ4Wkeo4NmEcMJA-tiZU7_OKANcsAqn4pFGhETGUzkfK62ef2mCDJAlhlFiqzhw8J-Cn1sKFjzS5TaCssARJK2rkBAsD0=&c=Hj54kEc7P1IEp4Bwm2Pibs5VRR643-efF5E0BHfrbhtqj6k3yKy7eA==&ch=ZduyoS0ZcTYRsEEFXRaVYBjIZweY8K1qax_k31DE569hAAGk0zT_Hg==) for state House District 34 on Tuesday, a suburban district outside Atlanta, Republican candidates received a combined 59% of the vote, outperforming the previous Republican candidate who won with 56% in November 2020.
"It was a great test of engagement and turnout," Loeffler told the Washington Examiner in an interview. "While it was a relatively under-the-radar election, the engagement we saw, whether it was from voters or volunteers, I think is indicative of the energy that's going to be there in 2022."
In addition to registering thousands of new voters, Greater Georgia has engaged over 170,000 registered but inactive conservative-leaning voters, according to metrics first provided to the Washington Examiner. With digital ads and text messages about election integrity issues, it reached more than 700,000 Georgians. It recruited 150 volunteers and held eight registration and mobilization events.
Those could help reengage Republicans who voted in the 2020 general election but not in the Jan. 5 Georgia Senate runoff. Over 750,000 voters skipped the runoff, [according](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k0ZjmowZ5eTlvPISoqwHeOoEcW-LDw1x3wIfeKD_ibNRf9_VdKkIJNjJfJNWCVWbA2AirxQAFYS_qk9uKUSoho-CwNO4A1KsEhoK_s5FBA7Wy56YQ78-FC2IYGUxnYMaohWqoBjWYQFhsgz40RGixfqypamJBxvaWxuTmp2RCFMRjujosaUTDuyBCScJ0DbkxkiP8d6YBHCGWDZidvmoxB4m7p58zAKrdNh8TdI6nEInE_0oNsxtrC-Q9h2FuY4zBykRjzMNpyE=&c=Hj54kEc7P1IEp4Bwm2Pibs5VRR643-efF5E0BHfrbhtqj6k3yKy7eA==&ch=ZduyoS0ZcTYRsEEFXRaVYBjIZweY8K1qax_k31DE569hAAGk0zT_Hg==) to an Atlanta Journal-Constitution analysis. According to Loeffler, 330,000 of those were conservatives.
Loeffler [launched](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k0ZjmowZ5eTlvPISoqwHeOoEcW-LDw1x3wIfeKD_ibNRf9_VdKkIJG4spu_K59qyBgItmI10eGc9W8DL6F5sB-DW8ApDavDKF0jjHLK5hRkUVnxGKwpm26n3BLWVZ5PGsm6J3odDtXdzplxwSwNRvytmmaSZWCj3lSNMgOqGVYZq-zyVKI_1IhvefELPHSpjAyGHvL1idYi1BpwtJi_RUk4-uEtwMaYB&c=Hj54kEc7P1IEp4Bwm2Pibs5VRR643-efF5E0BHfrbhtqj6k3yKy7eA==&ch=ZduyoS0ZcTYRsEEFXRaVYBjIZweY8K1qax_k31DE569hAAGk0zT_Hg==) Greater Georgia in February after narrowly losing a Jan. 5 runoff election to Democratic Sen. Raphael Warnock, whose election along with Democratic Sen. Jon Ossoff gave Democrats a razor-thin majority in the Senate. The organization is the conservative answer to Democrat Stacey Abrams's Fair Fight, which has nationwide fame for mobilizing liberals on election issues.
"If you think about the operation that Stacey Abrams set up with Fair Fight, she's really had a monopoly on voter engagement, registration, even going as far as to use the courts to change our election laws here in Georgia," Loeffler said. "We just see a lot of demand for what we're doing in terms of not just registration, but reaching out to diverse communities and also protecting election integrity."
Loeffler has leaned into battles over election processes. In April, she [called](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k0ZjmowZ5eTlvPISoqwHeOoEcW-LDw1x3wIfeKD_ibNRf9_VdKkIJOMKLKqjJ6_ZWuNg6_es8uzFKRBgQnzHcIJYF20JcQGP8xw8eVV45iXTpjKcwq1rlOMZlRF3Kvo66GpncG5F_TT3gJIImHchI45Y_-nAkPrb0o9uetP96NWWlqky6q3CYkaxv04Z2S1wDduTrEBY6w-NjzkQSXjfZ-I4jTacBLXA8-bwXsLfglrpn4jJF5lYoQ==&c=Hj54kEc7P1IEp4Bwm2Pibs5VRR643-efF5E0BHfrbhtqj6k3yKy7eA==&ch=ZduyoS0ZcTYRsEEFXRaVYBjIZweY8K1qax_k31DE569hAAGk0zT_Hg==) on the state's attorney general to investigate Georgia Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger (a frequent target of former President [Donald Trump](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k0ZjmowZ5eTlvPISoqwHeOoEcW-LDw1x3wIfeKD_ibNRf9_VdKkIJNjJfJNWCVWb--Z5jqaSrZtZKhWJB9S7kYXYZPLxDReJyB3b71fJ3BjkcCZqL9slUCp-wfTSbNHRlkQH33J5oZGQN6cy5BUfyN-w1XNS9PlvupRSG7pkOIBMBB0GTMT9wtYkadImPCoFNkIcBUiPuwq5Cz8TRFovBKkKXNF7nmLEfnfdgpOTjKRaRsPmescj6ANQXEle7I_IPfb0Wp0ZP8AvxHW4AfDiaK7INss29x_5&c=Hj54kEc7P1IEp4Bwm2Pibs5VRR643-efF5E0BHfrbhtqj6k3yKy7eA==&ch=ZduyoS0ZcTYRsEEFXRaVYBjIZweY8K1qax_k31DE569hAAGk0zT_Hg==)), accusing him of downplaying "voters' legitimate concerns about changes to Georgia's elections which were related to the pandemic."
An internal Greater Georgia poll found that among Republicans who voted in the 2020 general election but not the runoff, 89% said that they would be more likely to vote in 2022 if they were confident the elections would be fair and accurate.
"Election integrity is the No. 1 issue for conservative voters," Loeffler said.
Greater Georgia is also combating Democratic talking points that Republican efforts to change voting laws aim to suppress minority voters. The group has hosted six roundtables with community leaders from the African American, Hispanic American, Asian American and Pacific Islander, and Indian American communities.
Though she's encouraged by the engagement the group has seen so far, "We can't take that for granted," Loeffler said. She hopes to "make sure that the conservative movement is engaged in election integrity, voter registration, [and] growing our tent" year-round rather than just during election season.
Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k0ZjmowZ5eTlvPISoqwHeOoEcW-LDw1x3wIfeKD_ibNRf9_VdKkIJNjJfJNWCVWbcwYyTEHbFTqTG_rxEo1xiZXDZD26PlSSaE9crGNpqz_JmNgAhl7v6tCaP7jvguRfvJEAupABB2fXiycFkDU7b7Q2DYHXnVJrMKqAAmyllAC3WoOiybha-RzP2pVmK1IVChSIOsz_AsZ9GECKi8KykOmZv23Q5YP9&c=Hj54kEc7P1IEp4Bwm2Pibs5VRR643-efF5E0BHfrbhtqj6k3yKy7eA==&ch=ZduyoS0ZcTYRsEEFXRaVYBjIZweY8K1qax_k31DE569hAAGk0zT_Hg==) to read the full article.

name: Stephanie Murphy
subject: Happy Pride!
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Stephanie Murphy for Congress
body:
Celebrating your movement, your history, and your life!

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31168299/291805423/-1065962055?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTJlMzU0Zi1iZGQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YMkiInzZw-T9tOuZBwvmluaC3yRikrfXhF2c2o0YH-U=&emci=1ffb998c-9ad2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=612e354f-bdd2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=20387125)

| | Friend,

Happy Pride!

To all my friends and constituents in the LGBTQ community, this is a month to celebrate **_your_** movement, **_your_** history, and **_your_** life!

Please know you will _always_ have an ally and an advocate in me.

From day one in the House of Representatives, I’ve fought for LGBTQ equality -- and it’s even part of the reason I decided to run for Congress.

After the horrific Pulse nightclub shooting in June 2016, I watched as my congressman accepted a contribution from the NRA just days after the shooting. So I ran against him later that year and put commonsense gun safety laws and LGBTQ rights front and center.

And when I came to Congress, I helped pass the Equality Act in the House to prohibit discrimination on the basis of sex, gender identity, and sexual orientation.

_**But I know it’s not enough. We can always do more in the cause of equality.**_

So I will continue to fight for your rights, each and every day I’m in office. Thank you, thank you all, for making America a better, brighter place to live.

\-- Stephanie Murphy

name: Derek Schmidt
subject: SAVE OUR SCHOOLS!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
I just took a very important step to protect Kansas kids and the future of pro-American education in our state. I'm emailing now because I wanted you Friend, I just took a very important step to protect Kansas kids and the future of pro-American education in our state. I'm emailing now because I wanted you to be among the first to know. I just became the first and only candidate in this race for governor to sign the "Save Our Schools" pledge, organized by 1776 Action, a group supported by former Speaker of the House Newt Gingrich and inspired by President Trump. Taking this pledge makes it crystal clear to you the voters that one of my top priorities is making sure future generations of Kansans are taught to love America, understand our history, good and bad, and cherish the freedom it provides. By signing, I fully commit myself to keeping Kansas a state free of damaging ideas like critical race theory, which seeks to rewrite our history and teach our children to be ashamed of their country. **I wanted to reach out not only to let you know immediately, but ask for your support. ** **[If you are with me in this fight to SAVE OUR SCHOOLS from the liberal lie, I need you to show it. Will you chip in $17.76 now to help me fight?](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=eeee97bbee544aabb2352875681e1f88&_e=ok0C7BNlbKOhXrKJ4sdF-p_zFnZr7YkxaGpKxDyJ1DuYE9NSHcJYIJbf9DN9t9x1lWyIeX2KNmL7xDta2s81rft-asThIitRx4yMGI0tW6awcE8mDXpkxS01ecIIyAtEOmMGJZWUEAX3pN-uj80CgncT2B9gMu6YdqTcqywt4xNQ7mkzh15hldp78uY69mQyOeU-7_-zuLy60tNUQnCRlJgoJG4pUHNy7f2hzKDqvign4Ew3Vlxg0xrcrexF0JC34_M9Y-b3WmtySl-jw5L2F66a87Rw5uqaQCEZraZfwAcox0-9iJ6-CfrwKSJCR2tNr_UbeY9AsDMA-bRC6K1HmL9yHKKvryShEw4zSvqFsW7UjWI1UK1af-YO4JfWMi28788cqWhRHyKNwBaSqSWoBHEqs9Z915-tM38zW34dIt55Qn03LqfJCyff0OcF-c6PS5maS0JpyYo74FagZp4sRw%3D%3D)** [**STOP CRITICAL RACE THEORY!**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=eeee97bbee544aabb2352875681e1f88&_e=ok0C7BNlbKOhXrKJ4sdF-p_zFnZr7YkxaGpKxDyJ1DuYE9NSHcJYIJbf9DN9t9x1btSvQ6PKIA4sg7sBd1lZTYD6MgjezudB74i-dnn81Vodss8qYhAj_wUGjoH7LUJ4knE_6nFMuWM7r_Xnl_bX790wgs_dWL_gPIqVOQfH1mLAlz1nYgcBDs-m9b98UwvU95LBL-wh2LqyfTD7-dZZRKQd2jz3WgL_Ny52cAuAHKnLpPW9ksD9JsAhxMq9SAxOt7ve1aTUltcV5tHYuk3v3EWDJXF2qMQrnCfzxQlzB5aPCXjjfe1z8tmNrzNJAbETLVEWi1NNIL6Rw06m0foHb4dEHfH9WLRlXO_vdRX0Kyy8ecTa--sLE6gVBDKWbscvDfl1cvASXbT9ZQp55xcnl7GqvZuJ257MSGTc_CCB4z5U9a736o4dEMAgJGq1TixT) [**SAVE OUR SCHOOLS**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=eeee97bbee544aabb2352875681e1f88&_e=ok0C7BNlbKOhXrKJ4sdF-p_zFnZr7YkxaGpKxDyJ1DuYE9NSHcJYIJbf9DN9t9x1btSvQ6PKIA4sg7sBd1lZTYD6MgjezudB74i-dnn81Vodss8qYhAj_wUGjoH7LUJ4knE_6nFMuWM7r_Xnl_bX790wgs_dWL_gPIqVOQfH1mLAlz1nYgcBDs-m9b98UwvU95LBL-wh2LqyfTD7-dZZRJbmTs1nvG7MTraXfUqnwRjjwtNTnDU737glPGmCYTDd5CpGn_Jh-A9vEOxWJY0x9sLU7jGc-_3wdmck5xtLDxX585-cYdb451ii6XEbmk5LMkPob4b8oNT1HffD_1otygAv9oXKD4BKnpspHrjRRpwf6_A2t2NQsvbW31XO0DjjCUiuGToYS8s8MWJN1EI-snZS79ypWwxpyJ3ZMQ2MuhrAhcZDvfqX_QgjhCaCDIUq) Our children deserve to be brought up in a state that recognizes and celebrates American greatness. They deserve to hear and learn from the heroic stories of our Founding Fathers... **Not be spoon-fed lies based in socialism. ** Friend, this isn't a battle that is fought only in Washington. This is not some distant policy debate... This is an issue playing out in our Kansas communities... in strings attached to federal grants... in our kids' classrooms. **I am all-in in the fight to guarantee that our children are taught to love the United States of America, the greatest country on Earth. ** **[But I need to know that you are in this with me. clean_body: I just took a very important step to protect Kansas kids and the future of pro-American education in our state. I'm emailing now because I wanted you Friend, I just took a very important step to protect Kansas kids and the future of pro-American education in our state. I'm emailing now because I wanted you to be among the first to know. I just became the first and only candidate in this race for governor to sign the "Save Our Schools" pledge, organized by 1776 Action, a group supported by former Speaker of the House Newt Gingrich and inspired by President Trump. Taking this pledge makes it crystal clear to you the voters that one of my top priorities is making sure future generations of Kansans are taught to love America, understand our history, good and bad, and cherish the freedom it provides. By signing, I fully commit myself to keeping Kansas a state free of damaging ideas like critical race theory, which seeks to rewrite our history and teach our children to be ashamed of their country. I wanted to reach out not only to let you know immediately, but ask for your support. Our children deserve to be brought up in a state that recognizes and celebrates American greatness. They deserve to hear and learn from the heroic stories of our Founding Fathers... Not be spoon-fed lies based in socialism. Friend, this isn't a battle that is fought only in Washington. This is not some distant policy debate... This is an issue playing out in our Kansas communities... in strings attached to federal grants... in our kids' classrooms. I am all-in in the fight to guarantee that our children are taught to love the United States of America, the greatest country on Earth. Derek Schmidt | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

subject: AG Candidate Nathan Hochman Partners with California District Attorneys to Combat the Spread of Fentanyl
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nathan Hochman for Attorney General 2022
body:
Hochman has partnered with District Attorneys in San Luis Obispo, Yolo, El Dorado and Riverside counties to combat the drug’s continuing spread. | | | [Peter, to v](https://mailchi.mp/1e426718fc06/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4391782?e=94837ebab3)[iew this email in ](https://mailchi.mp/1e426718fc06/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4391782?e=94837ebab3)[your](https://mailchi.mp/1e426718fc06/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4391782?e=94837ebab3)[ browser](https://mailchi.mp/1e426718fc06/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4391782?e=94837ebab3)[, click here.](https://mailchi.mp/1e426718fc06/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4391782?e=94837ebab3)
---
| |
---
| | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
June 21, 2021
---
Contact:
Press@NathanHochman.com
---
| **California Attorney General Candidate Nathan Hochman Partners with California District Attorneys to Combat the Spread of Fentanyl**
---
| **Los Angeles, CA –** Following a statewide push for reform in how prosecutors handle cases of fentanyl overdoses, former US Assistant Attorney General and candidate for California Attorney General, Nathan Hochman, has partnered with District Attorneys from El Dorado County, Yolo County, San Luis Obispo County and Riverside County to combat the drug’s continuing spread across California.

Hochman is proposing that District Attorneys implement an “Alexandra notice”, which will require convicted fentanyl drug dealers to acknowledge that the manufacture and distribution of fentanyl is “extremely dangerous to human life,” and if in the future someone dies as a result of their continued actions, they can be charged with voluntary manslaughter or murder.

_"The purpose of the ‘Alexandra notice’ is to deter first-time fentanyl dealers from becoming second-time fentanyl dealers, saving innocent lives,” Hochman stated._

On March 23, 2021, legislators in the California State Senate failed to pass SB 350, by Senator Melissa Melendez, which would have required “Alexandra notices” statewide.

In response, [Hochman sent a letter to each District Attorney in California](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=b00c98ba18&e=94837ebab3) asking for the policy change at the county level and providing additional information about the issue. Since then, Hochman has worked with El Dorado District Attorney Vernon Pierson, Yolo County District Attorney Jeffrey Reisig, Riverside County District Attorney Michael Hestrin, and San Luis Obispo District Attorney Dan Dow, among others, to implement the “Alexandra notice” policy for their counties.

_“The failure of California politicians to stop the spread of fentanyl and save lives is unacceptable,"_ Hochman added. _"I am calling on our District Attorneys to step up where Sacramento has let us down. Instituting ‘Alexandra notices’ is a critical first step in getting fentanyl off the streets.”_

Fentanyl is 50 times more powerful than heroin and 100 times more powerful than morphine. As little as two milligrams (or two grains of rice) can kill within two minutes, and there are 5,000 milligrams in a teaspoon of fentanyl. Fentanyl is responsible for over half of the drug overdose deaths in California which equates to over a thousand child deaths a year. In most circumstances, drug dealers hide lethal doses of fentanyl inside counterfeit and fake Oxycodone, Percocet, Adderall, and Xanax pills (“fentapills”) or mix it with traditional hard street drugs such as heroin or cocaine, and even marijuana products, to increase their profits per drug sale.

Nathan Hochman has served as a prosecutor, defense attorney, victim rights advocate, and was appointed by President George W. Bush and confirmed by the US Senate in 2008 as US Assistant Attorney General overseeing the Department of Justice’s Tax Division. Nathan also served as President of the Los Angeles City Ethics Commission . Nathan is running as a Republican for Attorney General of California in 2022 and has made addressing fentanyl and the drug epidemic a major campaign priority. On social media, Nathan has posted a series of [videos](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=4daabc556c&e=94837ebab3) on the fentanyl epidemic that have received over 400,000 views.

To learn more about Nathan, visit: [NathanHochman.com](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=d83ea542cf&e=94837ebab3) or follow the campaign on social media @NathanHochmanAG ###
---
| | Paid for by Nathan Hochman for Attorney General 2022
FPPC ID 1437955

You can [update your preferences](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=5e18d418e9&e=94837ebab3&c=2f15cf1ce8) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=5e18d418e9&e=94837ebab3&c=2f15cf1ce8).

subject: We’re being OUTSPENT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
Glenn Youngkin is winning online.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31170136/291811847/1097049879?refcode=20210621.2_TVA_6BM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWZmMzVkYi1jM2QyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Plx10FRQx0hv8HS-3LOfdpu-YIuTxCidsAXaLr-AHAE=)
| | Derek, all spending by political campaigns online is public -- Google and Facebook regularly update their numbers. That’s how we know this worrisome fact: Glenn Youngkin is outspending us 3 to 1 online.

We told you Youngkin’s pledge to spend $75 million buying his way into office would be a problem. Now, we’re seeing just how big of an issue it is.

We’ve all seen just how impactful digital ads are, especially in races as tight as this one. body:
Here in the sunshine state, we don’t just run our mouths with ideas, we take REAL ACTION. . | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=74e87dcd7f02477dad4c6666e2341069&_e=QbJxq90At73wnQwxTiyau6M8QG74oMsuMJ6GGXGbsGtGTP8CYL5XkgbsJ9MOe392BKth4PBq3RzTG8q6pYXiHgT_4yvDTggr33mBbjPxZ88VtZxFUlXXFgT5loW4r52hWScp67p6igaL_lEVcespwATV-YG4ALyCMotlcziTvWcS5LIJK4I5XzceCXh_5XOMID1bB1AhKQvNIE9nDe6DE-2Is8gTLcNWEEuPEsujT-6dhtzOV13_tLbTJE11ImHq5YnNu64OR5Pg5Gt6Nf5oLaarBzlPGnFh0F6u6Zyc1SsQgCYlXsZ40jTYJ6VMZMGlH0I7zjBJfiFkUgxxziuN_Ty6ngtre19Nv33h3D8HLBgJ8nw0wCmoZFTAHK0goj4snLagjTAt-QsDEbNCYtmwAG5E8TmuA3zp8mPHPqeDo5KbF96bAH-jR1Ppk4dwtnr7TyNlsVEsnZGaRHN0toWZkMciV3gsmzNQ5t_xyvto3NU%3D)

---
Fellow American - - I'm proud to be living and running for Congress in the great state of Florida. Here in the sunshine state, we don’t just run our mouths with ideas, we take REAL ACTION to protect America from the absolute failure of the Biden Administration. **We take action to defend and secure our southern border.**

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=74e87dcd7f02477dad4c6666e2341069&_e=QbJxq90At73wnQwxTiyau6M8QG74oMsuMJ6GGXGbsGtGTP8CYL5XkgbsJ9MOe392BKth4PBq3RzTG8q6pYXiHgT_4yvDTggr33mBbjPxZ88VtZxFUlXXFgT5loW4r52hWScp67p6igaL_lEVcespwATV-YG4ALyCMotlcziTvWcS5LIJK4I5XzceCXh_5XOMID1bB1AhKQvNIE9nDe6DE-2Is8gTLcNWEEuPEsujT-6dhtzOV13_tLbTJE11ImHquiDrdmwu0ZvC5WMKSrWjoDEs9oBFeRlacRrw1UpkbkIwpi6JOHYWq9eOnuNehFYkWoGEkB2SW7pYM75DrMpyjRBbA2ERlgGeIWOjxx-oBFEhu7-huHoMrYktBxXaujL_guO2zjkJOFTa5cpVrdwspwwgJtJ8xfC3XUrhd5O-C4O2dQRARitilW--MW2c5rSs6WTs8ac2A3l8dF5Pp74PJpuDU21l1VGK_oCJomNKurE%3D)

The Democrat currently representing this district won’t admit that Biden created this national security crisis. But we all know, we had strong immigration policies and our borders were protected when Donald Trump was in office. Meanwhile, the Democrats Border Czar hasn’t even made an appearance at our southern border.

**_Now, it’s up to Republicans to pick up where Trump left off and FINISH THE WALL._**

We are all paying the price for Biden’s weak policies. I’m working my tail off to get to Congress and fight for conservatives across the country - because we clearly need strong leaders. But I need your support to WIN. But we all know, we had strong immigration policies and our borders were protected when Donald Trump was in office. Meanwhile, the Democrats Border Czar hasn’t even made an appearance at our southern border. Now, it’s up to Republicans to pick up where Trump left off and FINISH THE WALL. | | Peter, Spend any amount of time with me and you will quickly learn, I say what's on my mind and I mean it, and I do what I commit to doing. I call that integrity. Republican politicians in D.C. say one thing and do something else. They call it "business as usual". But we know it for what it is: **Hypocrisy.** **[Please make a donation of $16. Your support allows this campaign to tell it like it is and ask the truly tough questions.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31171940/291819830/-34735242?refcode=2021-06-21-hypocrisy&recurring=0&amount=16&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=4cd85849-cbd2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2Q4NTg0OS1jYmQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PpXk8_2gQW_u2n95FqifC4x2Z5HE7dvLYKaIcQZ4JzI=)** For years, our communities have _suffered_ the double-standards. Tax cuts by and for these same wealthy politicians, while the rest of us work two jobs and barely get by. Thousand-dollar lunches with Big Oil execs and lobbyists intent on poisoning our drinking water with fracking runoff. Showing off their flag pin, while cozying up to the armed extremists trying to overthrow our country. Let's do the math, Peter: Say one thing + Do another = Republican insiders in Washington D.C. I'm a Democrat running for the U.S. Senate because I believe we can do so much better, and the people in power have shown they're willing to do so much worse. **Here's my promise:_Even after I'm inside, I will never be an insider._** It's a tough road, taking on established interests. And I'm talking about in both Republican and Democratic camps. But that was always going to be the case. And I knew from the start that if we wanted take on the status quo, the have and have not culture in this country, and the politicians who divide us, that we'd need to get help from people like you. **[I'm asking for your support to do just that. Please make a donation today and be part of the team.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31171942/291819833/-34735242?refcode=2021-06-21-hypocrisy&recurring=0&amount=16&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=4cd85849-cbd2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2Q4NTg0OS1jYmQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PpXk8_2gQW_u2n95FqifC4x2Z5HE7dvLYKaIcQZ4JzI=)**
