clean_body: | | | Peter, Spend any amount of time with me and you will quickly learn, I say what's on my mind and I mean it, and I do what I commit to doing. I call that integrity. Republican politicians in D.C. say one thing and do something else. They call it "business as usual". But we know it for what it is: Hypocrisy. = For years, our communities have suffered the double-standards. Tax cuts by and for these same wealthy politicians, while the rest of us work two jobs and barely get by. Thousand-dollar lunches with Big Oil execs and lobbyists intent on poisoning our drinking water with fracking runoff. Showing off their flag pin, while cozying up to the armed extremists trying to overthrow our country. Let's do the math, Peter: Say one thing + Do another = Republican insiders in Washington D.C. I'm a Democrat running for the U.S. Senate because I believe we can do so much better, and the people in power have shown they're willing to do so much worse. Here's my promise:Even after I'm inside, I will never be an insider. It's a tough road, taking on established interests. And I'm talking about in both Republican and Democratic camps. But that was always going to be the case. And I knew from the start that if we wanted take on the status quo, the have and have not culture in this country, and the politicians who divide us, that we'd need to get help from people like you. = John Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | PAID FOR BY MCGUIGAN FOR PA ---|--- | This email was sent by McGuiganForPA P.O. name: Team Schrier
subject: Call on the Senate to pass the For the People Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Since Democrats took back the White House, Senate, and held onto the House majority last election, Republicans in state legislatures across the country have been hard at work attacking our right to vote. They're trying to change the rules in order to hold on to power. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31172010/291820075/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGQ4NTg0OS1jYmQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bYW58faSg-XXIuOC4c4T2zMNr8R5hfb4oHgbTjuoqGY=&emci=c91fd192-b9d2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=40d85849-cbd2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Since Democrats took back the White House, Senate, and held onto the House majority last election, Republicans in state legislatures across the country have been hard at work attacking our right to vote. They're trying to change the rules in order to hold on to power.

So far this year, 389 bills in 48 states have been introduced to restrict voting rights. And in 14 states, these voter suppression bills _have already become law._ **From restrictive voter ID laws to voter roll purges, Donald Trump's allies will do whatever it takes to attack our right to vote.**

Earlier this year, Kim and her Democratic colleagues took action to protect our democracy from these voter suppression tactics by passing H.R. 1, the For the People Act. This bill will help strengthen and reform our democracy by providing automatic voter registration, enacting ballot box protections, ending partisan gerrymandering, and more.

The For the People Act is an important step toward ensuring everyone's voices are heard and that our elected officials actually serve the people who elected them. Now, the Senate is set to vote on this historic legislation tomorrow. While Mitch McConnell will do everything he can to block this legislation, we need to know that you're with us in the fight to protect our democracy.

**[Will you add your name to join Kim in calling on the Senate to protect _every_ American's right to vote and pass the For the People Act?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31172012/291820076/1875773514?gpsid=8_30_19467&ms=em21_210621_voting_adv_gq_act__ts_ettx&refcode=em21_210621_voting_adv_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210621_voting_adv_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGQ4NTg0OS1jYmQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bYW58faSg-XXIuOC4c4T2zMNr8R5hfb4oHgbTjuoqGY=&emci=c91fd192-b9d2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=40d85849-cbd2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15820338)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31172014/291820078/1875773514?gpsid=8_30_19467&ms=em21_210621_voting_adv_gq_act__ts_ettx&refcode=em21_210621_voting_adv_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210621_voting_adv_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGQ4NTg0OS1jYmQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bYW58faSg-XXIuOC4c4T2zMNr8R5hfb4oHgbTjuoqGY=&emci=c91fd192-b9d2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=40d85849-cbd2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15820338)

Team Schrier

subject: Nothing we can’t make up for
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends — we just have one question.
[**Will you kick off the week with a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign? We’ll put your donation to work immediately in our efforts to hold Arizona’s seat and keep Mark in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210621-1-15&t=1&refcode2=829_6688874_hGyhCo&akid=829%2E6688874%2EhGyhCo)
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210621-1-15&t=2&refcode2=829_6688874_hGyhCo&akid=829%2E6688874%2EhGyhCo)**
Your support couldn’t come at a more important time, friend. We’ve been crunching the numbers and we’re a little behind where we thought we’d be at this point in the month. It’s nothing we can’t make up for, but it’s especially important that we don’t fall too far behind, because our Republican opponents are ramping up their spending.
We know we can get back on track with your help. So what do you say, friend?
**You can use the link below to make a donation today:**
[**https://act.markkelly.com/go/June-Goal**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210621-1-15&t=3&refcode2=829_6688874_hGyhCo&akid=829%2E6688874%2EhGyhCo)
Thank you for all that you do,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=829%2E6688874%2EhGyhCo).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. subject: Hillary Clinton Lied. An Ambassador Died
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Congress
body:
For six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=4fea9fb638a34d5ebde781b70f6b41b4&_t=OnkW9JlgbfvlESN0b9mlIqQkbzvatinz2rokE3DJ-trAc9lQlaDOG18GsRMYG6VRijl-IN4r018o9enYhlmEZuq_ncRikRKLQE6qY5Umey6fw5hEcNeTF0Vu-FJ7U8qqNENglBR13ztgAA20kEANDhlAvzRWX6X4VY1I_jrYWZY%3D) | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4fea9fb638a34d5ebde781b70f6b41b4&_e=sFAveYbl5JFoPKzzG97G02W2DE9l6OMe4h_iZZkL0dPnUEndHB-R7xLMT1OE5n9nqQbQC7yr8FR5OBrxJtFtpiJBnnWxJ-PjWDt4CaX3Ywxgz8hYVjuP3w2VUozEah7wFEmuZTd47i--4WE98aZvBUeEPlQsrDyf6XS5FpYi8N6cfyLV6QvkyPdlOgPtyaq3BWBiTMvp4XjwLbNJ6YWeYue3e7nFOk8tS4RZaFuayrl2ZwQ6cn4rJ8bOEJ6bUTfqTITMe4Htei0MbuIIE6gyAEki9BlKSrYCqcvVUr09pQ0fpmvAgjftHn2zvdW1tcVsoiFw3mPKY3_1-VhUV1adp5gmnvJjR8wEx2-5aNBjETO0aZKiorKUnnduDEZm6FD0QGeb_gkKhLyWCOU8FoTB5LcYoHqUZC9dkwzfbb67syO4wsmiYaqL2rjQZRL5rxfm-ob14DPC5jfWWMk9U_A4NRLkapN4Nv9gq9t37QdyX0M%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox **I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today.**

I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.**I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own**.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4fea9fb638a34d5ebde781b70f6b41b4&_e=sFAveYbl5JFoPKzzG97G02W2DE9l6OMe4h_iZZkL0dPnUEndHB-R7xLMT1OE5n9nqQbQC7yr8FR5OBrxJtFtpiJBnnWxJ-PjWDt4CaX3Ywxgz8hYVjuP3w2VUozEah7wFEmuZTd47i--4WE98aZvBUeEPlQsrDyf6XS5FpYi8N6cfyLV6QvkyPdlOgPtyaq3BWBiTMvp4XjwLbNJ6YWeYue3e7nFOk8tS4RZaFuayrl2ZwQ6cn4rJ8bOEJ6bUTfqTITMe4Htei0MbuIIE6gyANOaEnUrPdaKAaO_gtBfzL4zUVmVFxfu3Ynt4SmAAPKqHkleA_LtcEMe_yAsbgaBtxE01As9Cn8dl7oXqT1JbnNG5kFVUePODguUBnakIQDafmzvlZ_twf_-Sy5am9eQIi3GIfTuu13oBeRhqPQOThLZciwdfl-LfpndRAV3H9vmE0aA0tFZeqDBhZfprJGAS0kY2blIyZHtLD84nFtLsYQ%3D)

Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency **[I gave up my career in the intelligence service- along with my security clearance - to run for Congress](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4fea9fb638a34d5ebde781b70f6b41b4&_e=sFAveYbl5JFoPKzzG97G02W2DE9l6OMe4h_iZZkL0dPnUEndHB-R7xLMT1OE5n9nqQbQC7yr8FR5OBrxJtFtpiJBnnWxJ-PjWDt4CaX3Ywxgz8hYVjuP3w2VUozEah7wFEmuZTd47i--4WE98aZvBUeEPlQsrDyf6XS5FpYi8N6cfyLV6QvkyPdlOgPtyaq3BWBiTMvp4XjwLbNJ6YWeYue3e7nFOk8tS4RZaFuayrl2ZwQ6cn4rJ8bOEJ6bUTfqTITMe4Htei0MbuIIE6gyACxc422H3nt1HYcjrO7Zs523CJIXRBjku3hNdRLfe1RxuSoBPC3eO8pe3vqoboY9ZFXOKNtn3Yq0fO0hyeUUEPWD697j5xM9wCSA3HnLPMD9YgqHaLrfJynNYWP4vdTAjzwzGktolLw1OZM52tL4alOefJ-4nfMF2LI-fj__nyomQ_HaCWmBCSmSXaVotH2rIIXfbnhb6epwY1IkNq-0RYg%3D)**. I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price.

If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.**As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable** , and in a moment, [**I’m going to humbly ask for your financial assistance regarding my campaign.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4fea9fb638a34d5ebde781b70f6b41b4&_e=sFAveYbl5JFoPKzzG97G02W2DE9l6OMe4h_iZZkL0dPnUEndHB-R7xLMT1OE5n9nqQbQC7yr8FR5OBrxJtFtpiJBnnWxJ-PjWDt4CaX3Ywxgz8hYVjuP3w2VUozEah7wFEmuZTd47i--4WE98aZvBUeEPlQsrDyf6XS5FpYi8N6cfyLV6QvkyPdlOgPtyaq3BWBiTMvp4XjwLbNJ6YWeYue3e7nFOk8tS4RZaFuayrl2ZwQ6cn4rJ8bOEJ6bUTfqTITMe4Htei0MbuIIE6gyAHdZjntFvOGKqf1d6V8pbHwC5Z45ZDQJItA8V0zdecCPmiqUSDgk_ErCVHcTmWccdEPf3JXW845NGSaFgalHThZ1Ls6ZjKTBj08M4I9HvMAYxPtM1gFBF3vH0nbkTIwDRWQzTlVQm7COcyAxgYdI_pxfa2kfX5jds8PqDyCVNll-3D55wtMYitkJoGH9F46Ql0OIzlZzF0mUgY-zfk8hP-8%3D)

You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, _**who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades**_ - along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel.

**This political assassination made my blood boil**. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me - even in the worst of times - that our freedom isn't free at all. _**We have to fight for it**_.

But the fact of the matter is this: An American ambassador was killed in the line of duty and politicians pointed fingers at each other over who was responsible. I believe strongly that healthcare is a right, not a privilege.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31174945/291830671/-1338678480?refcode=BLU-DDC-20210621-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzc4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjBlNjlhMC1kNWQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DFJGrfRXgj-KT1217HPrzBfoYzawxaIuxUZ6ECvpJQs=)

Paul Gosar and I do have one thing in common: we’ve both worked as healthcare professionals. But we seem to have learned very different things from our experiences. **While I saw how important it is to stand up for the vulnerable, Paul Gosar learned to profit off the suffering of others —[ _and that’s why I’m going to replace him in Congress._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31174946/291830672/-1338678480?refcode=BLU-DDC-20210621-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzc4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjBlNjlhMC1kNWQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DFJGrfRXgj-KT1217HPrzBfoYzawxaIuxUZ6ECvpJQs=)**

Even after working as a healthcare provider, Paul Gosar does not work to provide people with affordable healthcare and shows no compassion for families saddled with medical debt.
| [DEFEAT GOSAR ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31174951/291830673/-1338678480?refcode=BLU-DDC-20210621-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzc4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjBlNjlhMC1kNWQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DFJGrfRXgj-KT1217HPrzBfoYzawxaIuxUZ6ECvpJQs=)
---
**I am proud to be a registered nurse. When I was working as a nurse, I had to care for people while advocating for their needs to make sure they were safe and taken care of — and that’s exactly what I plan to do for the people of AZ-04.**

After seeing healthcare costs tear families apart and even seeing patients die after not being able to afford cancer treatment, **I believe strongly that healthcare is a right, not a privilege.**

**I’m looking forward to bringing the compassion I exercised as a nurse to represent the people of Arizona, and I’m hoping you can help me get there.[_Can you contribute $5, $10, or whatever you can spare to my campaign today? Peter,

I hope you had a pleasant weekend and are ready to help me make headway towards our end-of-quarter goal this week.

June is just absolutely FLYING BY and not in a good way. Time is fleeting and now we’re just NINE days away from the end of the 2nd-quarter. **For my team and I that means a lot of long hours from now through midnight on June 30 th. **

In case you need a quick reminder why we’ll be putting in extra time working the phones, writing emails and keeping you apprised of where we stand it’s this: **I would like to be able to show the NRCC (National Republican Campaign Committee) that my campaign has the necessary infrastructure to raise $100,000 online in the first two months following my declaration of candidacy.**

**If we’re able to reach this lofty goal, which we’re inching closer toward every day, we’ll qualify for their “On the Radar” program which assists “standout” candidates in battleground districts.**

**YOUR HELP** is crucial toward not only hitting but surpassing our goal. With nine days left, we’re about $12,000 from hitting the $100k mark. **[Would you chip in $100, $50 or even just $5 today?](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=886cc20ef26b45e2b21220f2be6cc123&_e=Tdu0NI4le6Bz_3rrliGdHy6xwpsr2hpPqH6cW-b7_I9w8Rwj3J7dr_QkTq9hEtg749T-l_gwSG_k90AwcSPm0horEUSBmc4BANQUEuCYimXSbmF1KQibHx3PgpgojYV03q5CwPAPTilH2ARsgV6lHSDiU6IjF1RTsCUraRQlxrQzVOCnPhMvmY-0tJk_za_Jh_EJZRkUbjwVnY9cZsroYdNy3MZXoiRaUzWBZYBwE3aIY1C8LM23iaZ4DOpB4P6zEC6deZqWi7sWrVVX315yOrRDQVrYqPJAz3_0O6REXUxdwPTLLRpoYqT4F0d4K4qUJrldSq4dSz9CZJSgCQc1mJBT8pbpwixojjq7IYBAYOhEd_TJ7sqGwNHmegwTiFguewCbOL93rgYO4oy7IciZcYBpdXZ97FJlFsbd1xn7B23C40uRY2GnPZvJz6MN7Pyu)**

[](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=886cc20ef26b45e2b21220f2be6cc123&_e=Tdu0NI4le6Bz_3rrliGdHy6xwpsr2hpPqH6cW-b7_I9w8Rwj3J7dr_QkTq9hEtg749T-l_gwSG_k90AwcSPm0horEUSBmc4BANQUEuCYimXSbmF1KQibHx3PgpgojYV03q5CwPAPTilH2ARsgV6lHSDiU6IjF1RTsCUraRQlxrQzVOCnPhMvmY-0tJk_za_Jh_EJZRkUbjwVnY9cZsroYe5MgCxgi_JhPm6t4l64EF8xC0hJ6R4uAimOnlp6rdAfOJ8PSzpr8L-RBEj-3mqBf91Qpfqv3S4c7VA8okDJdl_VCnK1s-EEBfQ7ZY5PorEysLke8efU0lOp-tyvXmrnXBgH_meq4QgenmstDDAWN1sOPfGSspPO1yClgXNR1VbewlRAMkFpzAyhjYV88ZcwyXM5RxvqjIAWot2Abhsy09QhaczIEJmrJYBSB3iyxTcP)
**[These fundraising goals are no joke and it’s crucial to the future of my campaign that we meet our goal before the June 30 th deadline.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=886cc20ef26b45e2b21220f2be6cc123&_e=Tdu0NI4le6Bz_3rrliGdHy6xwpsr2hpPqH6cW-b7_I9w8Rwj3J7dr_QkTq9hEtg749T-l_gwSG_k90AwcSPm0horEUSBmc4BANQUEuCYimXSbmF1KQibHx3PgpgojYV03q5CwPAPTilH2ARsgV6lHSDiU6IjF1RTsCUraRQlxrQzVOCnPhMvmY-0tJk_za_Jh_EJZRkUbjwVnY9cZsroYSFTBufig7beo_rmyTQGpKNc0h7ZonZlRQJ_zKeyxRKp5k34FpzpbJoBDqKHK-yRzRfawCRPyutAWv7W8PL6EviHMvMBS1_bn8tNxMyZ_oYDP_KWwDJyw9D7cj1UV-cJpMMQLxO1FZc1P_BrCUIsi4a8T6Snc-Av-gspO4kP-vCfZXrcLxxh1RJ-_wOo8lkhT5lqXwBvw_Nb9vZ6yZwEAMtX6WmXhKkBq3LLIBuQw-th)** The Left is bringing in new, big-money donors in droves right now and we only have a few weeks remaining - before we have to report our quarterly donations - **to show them that I mean business.**

Respectfully,

Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

[**DONATE TODAY -> **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=886cc20ef26b45e2b21220f2be6cc123&_e=Tdu0NI4le6Bz_3rrliGdHy6xwpsr2hpPqH6cW-b7_I9w8Rwj3J7dr_QkTq9hEtg749T-l_gwSG_k90AwcSPm0horEUSBmc4BANQUEuCYimXSbmF1KQibHx3PgpgojYV03q5CwPAPTilH2ARsgV6lHSDiU6IjF1RTsCUraRQlxrQzVOCnPhMvmY-0tJk_za_Jh_EJZRkUbjwVnY9cZsroYZujvFzLpQYOP84X-26FwIs4vOnWl3YBOSbYpdQu65lBTlXrZ9jJfOb8Hi64x5QKvTu3R31JVXLRZfGkGgOegzUR7Cg8igwYyaysfGUHifvrf-Gzdlw2eA7TgzHx4LMK5E3L5s1qwLvmmNN_W9XMqKYaNlJQLAD92-q9Ya1dnOwvIubx27avaXSX_v3xcJs9NZP5-npTfNVG0GWmaMtU_Xa7IfAk15EwxlCr4HbEUXwQ)

name: Stewart Navarre
subject: I hope you can join us on June 28th
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter, I hope all is well!
Our campaign is hosting a debrief on Monday, June 28th at 7PM ET before our very first end-of-quarter deadline. Whether you have already supported or would just like to join to learn more about the campaign, all are welcome!
We launched our campaign on April 5th and we are off to a great start. As I talk with voters across the district, one thing is clear: folks are fed up with the status quo. I would love to share with you why I am running now, how our campaign is progressing and answering any questions you might have.
If you would like to RSVP, please use this link or you may click on the invitation below. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eoq28]
Hopefully, I’ll see you soon!
-- Stewart Navarre
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eoq28 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eoq28]

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I'd rather not send this email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
please read | | |
---
Hi there, I'd really prefer not to send you emails asking for money. My focus continues to be fighting for hard-working families like yours in the Senate. However, I'm reaching out today because we're on the verge of lowering our fundraising projections for the second time this month -- we've got a $21,319 gap to fill TODAY. That's bad under normal circumstances, but since our public FEC fundraising deadline is right around the corner, this is the absolute worst time for our numbers to lag. **Mitch McConnell, Donald Trump, and far-right corporate special interests know that beating me in New Hampshire is their best chance at taking back the Senate majority,** so they're watching us like a hawk for any sign of weakness. That's why I'm counting on your help to get us out of this rut. **[Will you please donate what you can right now to help fill our fundraising hole and protect this seat -- and the Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31177424/291839217/1251890980?refcode=e20210621_mh-rathernot&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTM2ZTkyZC1kZmQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lm53Og6vAPRLtNwbP8itlndIk3W2nr6gVTl75rYcP88=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31177425/291839218/1251890980?refcode=e20210621_mh-rathernot&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTM2ZTkyZC1kZmQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lm53Og6vAPRLtNwbP8itlndIk3W2nr6gVTl75rYcP88=)
---
[Contribute $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31177427/291839219/1251890980?refcode=e20210621_mh-rathernot&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTM2ZTkyZC1kZmQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lm53Og6vAPRLtNwbP8itlndIk3W2nr6gVTl75rYcP88=)
[Contribute $50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31177429/291839220/1251890980?refcode=e20210621_mh-rathernot&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTM2ZTkyZC1kZmQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lm53Og6vAPRLtNwbP8itlndIk3W2nr6gVTl75rYcP88=)
[Another amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31177432/291839221/1251890980?refcode=e20210621_mh-rathernot&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTM2ZTkyZC1kZmQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lm53Og6vAPRLtNwbP8itlndIk3W2nr6gVTl75rYcP88=)
My Senate race was the closest one on the map in 2016. This means that missing a fundraising goal opens the door for Republicans to spread misinformation and rally GOP voters in the state. **In a swing state like New Hampshire, we cannot afford to give an inch.**
I know you see campaigns raising unimaginable sums of money, and it's easy to think that a grassroots donation won't make a dent. But I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to power our campaign, and your $5 makes a huge difference.
**[Please: Make a donation right now to help my campaign turn our fundraising around.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31177433/291839223/1251890980?refcode=e20210621_mh-rathernot&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTM2ZTkyZC1kZmQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lm53Og6vAPRLtNwbP8itlndIk3W2nr6gVTl75rYcP88=)**
Thank you -- I'm truly grateful.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Erica Smith HQ
subject: Can I send a sticker to you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
(while supplies last)
#
According to our finance records, you haven’t donated to Erica Smith for U.S. Senate yet. **That’s why we wanted you to be the first to know about a new opportunity to make an impact on our campaign AND get a free, union-made sticker — while supplies last before our end-of-quarter deadline, that is!**
[**_Make your very first donation today, and we’ll send you a free new sticker to say thanks._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2893?refcode=em20210621-197&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=197%2E3698%2EjYOqJc)

A single donation of any amount puts us closer to reaching our ambitious goal of 500 more contributions before June 30 – the number of contributions we must reach before the end-of-quarter deadline to show the strength of our moral movement and stay competitive in this race.
[**_Donate now to claim your free sticker and make a direct and immediate impact on our campaign._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2893?refcode=em20210621-197&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=197%2E3698%2EjYOqJc)

Erica Smith HQ

Everyday it seems we uncover new details about the Capitol insurrection and Donald Trump's involvement in the planning and execution of that dark day.

This week, we learned that Donald Trump had his Chief of Staff, Mark Meadows, bombarded Deputy Attorney General Jeffrey Rosen with emails touting bizarre and patently false allegations of election fraud in the 2020 election in the hopes that he would open an investigation into the matter.

Thankfully, Rosen never followed through on the claims, which his own deputy called “pure insanity,” but we cannot allow that good luck to keep us holding Trump and the rest of the GOP accountable for their crimes.

**[HOLD THEM ACCOUNTABLE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31177860/291840573/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210621_GEN_FDR_J&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU1ZWZlMDNhLWUwZDItZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lVFoy5HATHi8qiE80Eo_tlEhIr8SlRER71uwHuqp-w8=)**

We know we can only win this fight against extremism through sustained grassroots support, just like we did in 2020. We will fund progressive Democrats in tight races across the country \-- not at the last minute, but right now, when candidates are building their platform, speaking with communities, and helping register voters.

**[But those same Republicans are already pulling ahead of us this year, and we need to raise $5,580 in the next two days just to keep from shrinking our budgets. body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31177896/291840662/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGQyZWM4Yy1lMGQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JhOOGE2Ss_HNGqdqloijZ3QI-3jdkJOXqxPFmknHWyM=&emci=3e3de285-e0d2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=0dd2ec8c-e0d2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=11385749)

Peter,

One of the most essential parts of our democracy is the right to vote. **There should be nothing partisan about ensuring that every American citizen has the appropriate resources and time to vote.**

But that hasn't stopped Republican legislators like Mike Garcia from voting against common-sense legislation like the _For the People Act_.

Mike Garcia and his Republican colleagues are using Trump's election fraud lie to spread disinformation about the _For the People Act_ \-- which an overwhelming majority of Americans support.

**[As the Senate prepares to vote on this legislation, we need your help! Will you sign this petition in support of the _For the People Act_?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31177897/291840663/-1804459629?ms=em21_210621_forthepeople-s3&refcode=em21_210621_forthepeople-s3&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGQyZWM4Yy1lMGQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JhOOGE2Ss_HNGqdqloijZ3QI-3jdkJOXqxPFmknHWyM=&emci=3e3de285-e0d2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=0dd2ec8c-e0d2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=11385749)** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31177898/291840664/-1804459629?ms=em21_210621_forthepeople-s3&refcode=em21_210621_forthepeople-s3&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGQyZWM4Yy1lMGQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JhOOGE2Ss_HNGqdqloijZ3QI-3jdkJOXqxPFmknHWyM=&emci=3e3de285-e0d2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=0dd2ec8c-e0d2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=11385749) Here are some important parts of the _For the People Act_ :
1. Makes Election Day a federal holiday.

2. Cuts dark money out of politics.

3. Ends partisan gerrymandering by requiring states to use independent commissions to create the lines for congressional redistricting.

This bill is just commonsense -- but that didn't stop Mike Garcia from voting against it.

Now that the bill is up for a vote in the Senate this week, we have to show folks how important this bill is -- and _why it has to pass_.

**For far too long, basic democratic reforms have been overlooked. In the meantime, the Republicans have manipulated the actual message of the _For the People Act_ and used Trump's tactic of lies to justify their opposition.**

**[Peter, add your name in support of this imperative legislation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31177899/291840665/-1804459629?ms=em21_210621_forthepeople-s3&refcode=em21_210621_forthepeople-s3&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGQyZWM4Yy1lMGQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JhOOGE2Ss_HNGqdqloijZ3QI-3jdkJOXqxPFmknHWyM=&emci=3e3de285-e0d2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=0dd2ec8c-e0d2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=11385749)** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31177900/291840666/-1804459629?ms=em21_210621_forthepeople-s3&refcode=em21_210621_forthepeople-s3&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGQyZWM4Yy1lMGQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JhOOGE2Ss_HNGqdqloijZ3QI-3jdkJOXqxPFmknHWyM=&emci=3e3de285-e0d2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=0dd2ec8c-e0d2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=11385749) Thank you for doing your part in protecting the sanctity of our democracy.

name: Kelly Hall
subject: Doing the people’s work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Fairness Project
body:
Great to meet you!

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31177991/291840920/-1553393460?refcode=em062121_khintro_espy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2M0ZmYxMi1lMWQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rp0e-T-yB3NyUsoBHqZFon5Yd-yppPHX35JXSaZxZxc=) Hi team, It’s great to meet you! As the new Executive Director of The Fairness Project I thought I’d reach out to introduce myself and thank you for all of your support. **Though I’m new to this role, I’m not new to the organization. I’ve been launching our people-powered campaigns to expand Medicaid, raise the minimum wage, and provide paid leave for the past four years -- and this work is my lifelong passion. ** Growing up, I learned that politics and government are how we come together as a society to make decisions and make change. My dad teaches at a public university and studies our democratic institutions. To him, there is no higher calling than public service -- what he calls “ _doing the people’s work_.” That could mean working in the halls of government, but it really means any effort that benefits the many, not the few; that advocates for democracy, equality, and justice. Striving to do the people’s work has been the north star of my career. I’ve had the privilege of working on Capitol Hill helping to draft the Affordable Care Act and in President Obama’s Administration working to implement the law. I’ve worked with labor unions and health care advocates to improve our public health care programs, Medicare and Medicaid. I am immensely proud of my contributions to those important efforts on behalf of the American people, and yet nothing has felt more profoundly aligned with my aim to “do the people’s work” than my time with The Fairness Project. Ballot initiatives let the people enact their will directly into law, going around the special interests, backroom deals, and political compromise. When politicians refuse to act on common sense issues -- like raising the minimum wage, providing earned paid sick leave, and expanding health care -- The Fairness Project works to help voters break through the gridlock and change their lives for themselves. **Together we’ve won 20 campaigns since 2016, changing over 17 million lives in red, purple, and blue states.** That’s the power of direct democracy. That’s the power of _doing the people’s work_ , and doing it together. I am humbled and honored to be taking on this new role at The Fairness Project and very excited to keep working with you to build upon our winning record of directly changing lives through ballot measures. Together, with grassroots supporters like you by our side, we’ll break through the gridlock and win real change across the country. To the good work ahead,
Kelly | **[Donate →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31177992/291840921/-1553393460?refcode=em062121_khintro_espy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2M0ZmYxMi1lMWQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rp0e-T-yB3NyUsoBHqZFon5Yd-yppPHX35JXSaZxZxc=)**

clean_body: Great to meet you! | = Hi team, It’s great to meet you! As the new Executive Director of The Fairness Project I thought I’d reach out to introduce myself and thank you for all of your support. Though I’m new to this role, I’m not new to the organization. I’ve been launching our people-powered campaigns to expand Medicaid, raise the minimum wage, and provide paid leave for the past four years -- and this work is my lifelong passion. Growing up, I learned that politics and government are how we come together as a society to make decisions and make change. My dad teaches at a public university and studies our democratic institutions. To him, there is no higher calling than public service -- what he calls “ doing the people’s work.” That could mean working in the halls of government, but it really means any effort that benefits the many, not the few; that advocates for democracy, equality, and justice. Striving to do the people’s work has been the north star of my career. I’ve had the privilege of working on Capitol Hill helping to draft the Affordable Care Act and in President Obama’s Administration working to implement the law. I’ve worked with labor unions and health care advocates to improve our public health care programs, Medicare and Medicaid. I am immensely proud of my contributions to those important efforts on behalf of the American people, and yet nothing has felt more profoundly aligned with my aim to “do the people’s work” than my time with The Fairness Project. Ballot initiatives let the people enact their will directly into law, going around the special interests, backroom deals, and political compromise. When politicians refuse to act on common sense issues -- like raising the minimum wage, providing earned paid sick leave, and expanding health care -- The Fairness Project works to help voters break through the gridlock and change their lives for themselves. Together we’ve won 20 campaigns since 2016, changing over 17 million lives in red, purple, and blue states. That’s the power of direct democracy. That’s the power of doing the people’s work , and doing it together. I am humbled and honored to be taking on this new role at The Fairness Project and very excited to keep working with you to build upon our winning record of directly changing lives through ballot measures. Together, with grassroots supporters like you by our side, we’ll break through the gridlock and win real change across the country. To the good work ahead, Kelly | = Paid for by The Fairness Project. name: Team Malcolm
subject: Please
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
We need your support to defend our Democratic Senate majority
#

Hey, we wanted to send a quick update on our fundraising progress.
Our numbers are coming up a little short of where they need to be ahead of our official quarterly fundraising deadline next week.
After our deadline, we are legally mandated to report our fundraising numbers, so it's critical that we get back on track today.
**But in order to do that, we need a strong response from this grassroots team of supporters who believe that our government should work for working people. So we were hoping you could help.**
[Can you please make a $3 contribution to support our people-powered campaign to elect Malcolm Kenyatta before our official fundraising deadline? Every single donation makes a huge difference in powering our fight for working people.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31178190/291841333/-347207331?refcode2=576365d6-e1d2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210621-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzYzNjVkNi1lMWQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qZuQsIyO0YZwh36shvw52yUvdwgbRkEooFAU8H2iE4Q=)

After next Wednesday, our campaign is required by law to make our fundraising results public in a report everyone is waiting to see.
And since Malcolm is not taking a cent from corporate PACs or corporate lobbyists, people across Pennsylvania will be looking at our report to see if we have the grassroots energy to win this race and defend our Democratic Senate majority.
But the truth is, we're a bit short of where we had hoped to be at this point before the deadline.
So we're hoping for A LOT of donations this week to get us back on track. That's why we have to ask:
[If you're able, could you pitch in your first $3 contribution to put us in a good spot before our fundraising deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31178193/291841335/-347207331?refcode2=576365d6-e1d2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210621-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzYzNjVkNi1lMWQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qZuQsIyO0YZwh36shvw52yUvdwgbRkEooFAU8H2iE4Q=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31178194/291841336/-347207331?refcode2=576365d6-e1d2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210621-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzYzNjVkNi1lMWQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qZuQsIyO0YZwh36shvw52yUvdwgbRkEooFAU8H2iE4Q=)**
Thanks in advance for pitching in. We couldn't lead this important fight without you.
Team Malcolm

name: Jay Inslee
subject: This is what happens when we fail to address the crisis before us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We need federal action -- fast.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/z7qNF6x6z9J-/S0U0ckJFNXRuaU5pcWdNUUNmQXY0dG5hbjVlOENtMnNkSmRlUjhwM1ZtNDhMdml3blRDTThWRk9TdlJRZHROSzRVKy9aRWhBQVhFV21wNlNnOHNLUlVOdzRkb0UxYmtVY1V3UFpHTlpTSkk9S0/SFNFNDkxeUVHWVluY1RGMVArRWx5d3N4WnZOcVNweGdDalAvV0lsamMydz0S1) Friend, There are immense consequences when we fail to act on the climate crisis. Just take these two pieces of recent news as proof:
* This month we learned that the level of carbon dioxide in the atmosphere is the highest it's been in _4 million years_.
* Meanwhile, vast swaths of fellow Western states like Oregon, California, Nevada, Arizona, New Mexico, and Utah are in the throes of a catastrophic drought. Already, California's 1,500 reservoirs are holding about half the water they usually do in June.

This is what happens when we fail to address the crisis before us. Yet, as President Biden has demanded aggressive climate action as part of any infrastructure legislation, a group of senators are now pushing a gutless package, void of any meaningful investments in ending the climate crisis. **[We can't accept an infrastructure package that doesn't tackle the climate crisis. Full stop. Add your name next to mine to demand that Congress pass an infrastructure package that includes bold climate action.](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/wm0KtVWVKvFN/S0U0ckJFNXRuaU5pcWdNUUNmQXY0dG5hbjVlOENtMnNkSmRlUjhwM1ZtNDhMdml3blRDTThWRk9TdlJRZHROSzRVKy9aRWhBQVhFV21wNlNnOHNLUlVOdzRkb0UxYmtVY1V3UFpHTlpTSkk9S0/SFNFNDkxeUVHWVluY1RGMVArRWx5d3N4WnZOcVNweGdDalAvV0lsamMydz0S1)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/Z6qLHNmNq~CP/S0U0ckJFNXRuaU5pcWdNUUNmQXY0dG5hbjVlOENtMnNkSmRlUjhwM1ZtNDhMdml3blRDTThWRk9TdlJRZHROSzRVKy9aRWhBQVhFV21wNlNnOHNLUlVOdzRkb0UxYmtVY1V3UFpHTlpTSkk9S0/SFNFNDkxeUVHWVluY1RGMVArRWx5d3N4WnZOcVNweGdDalAvV0lsamMydz0S1)
---
Earlier this year, Washington state passed historic legislation to help mitigate the climate crisis. Our Climate Commitment Act creates a cap-and-invest program that limits and reduces greenhouse gas emissions across our economy, while our new Clean Fuel Standard expands the use of electric vehicles and lower-carbon fuels and enacts one of the strongest environmental policies in the nation. Our state is proof positive that you can pass comprehensive climate laws _and_ have one of the country's strongest economies.
But Washington state can't go it alone. To prevent further climate catastrophes (like the ones folks in the American West are already enduring), we need federal action -- fast. President Biden's American Jobs Plan, which proposes aggressive climate policies and federal programs like a Clean Electricity Standard and a Civilian Climate Corps, would be a historic start. Now, we need Congress to pass it.
**[Sign on today to show there's wide national support for a federal infrastructure package with bold climate action at its heart.](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/wm0KtVWVKvFN/S0U0ckJFNXRuaU5pcWdNUUNmQXY0dG5hbjVlOENtMnNkSmRlUjhwM1ZtNDhMdml3blRDTThWRk9TdlJRZHROSzRVKy9aRWhBQVhFV21wNlNnOHNLUlVOdzRkb0UxYmtVY1V3UFpHTlpTSkk9S0/SFNFNDkxeUVHWVluY1RGMVArRWx5d3N4WnZOcVNweGdDalAvV0lsamMydz0S1)**
Thank you for raising your voice with me to help end this crisis. Stay safe out there.
Very truly yours,
Jay
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/Z6qLHNmNq~CP/S0U0ckJFNXRuaU5pcWdNUUNmQXY0dG5hbjVlOENtMnNkSmRlUjhwM1ZtNDhMdml3blRDTThWRk9TdlJRZHROSzRVKy9aRWhBQVhFV21wNlNnOHNLUlVOdzRkb0UxYmtVY1V3UFpHTlpTSkk9S0/SFNFNDkxeUVHWVluY1RGMVArRWx5d3N4WnZOcVNweGdDalAvV0lsamMydz0S1)
---

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Let’s move forward without the GOP. Do you agree?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
There’s no reason to try and work with an obstructionist party that actively wants to stop our popular agenda. Let’s move forward without them.
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/3798?refcode=em20210621-394&t=1&akid=394%2E420207%2EV7--kR)
This is the well-known Mitch McConnell playbook: Block every Democratic bill and Supreme Court nomination he can. It’s never a secret. He did it with President Obama, and he’ll do it with President Biden. It’s classic Mitch.
But how we respond is up to us. We must do everything we can right now to pass critical voting rights, climate change, health care, and infrastructure legislation WITHOUT Republicans in Congress.
[**Can you chip in today to fuel our organizing work to pass critical legislation before it’s too late? name: JohnFetterman.com
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We noticed that our average donation amount has fallen a bit since John announced he was running back in February.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210621-1806-header&t=1&akid=1806%2E434096%2E7EvMRV)
Peter,
One of our team's big projects for this week is doing a deep dive into our fundraising numbers ahead of next week's giant Q2 reporting deadline (a.k.a. when John will have to publicly declare how much we've raised to the FEC.)
As we were going through our records, we noticed that **our average donation amount has fallen a bit** since John announced he was running back in February.
Here's a side-by-side comparison from ActBlue of our average donation from February vs. our average this quarter to date:
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20798?refcode=em20210621-1806&t=2&akid=1806%2E434096%2E7EvMRV)
Believe it or not, Peter, John doesn't see this as a bad thing. At all. He's downright glad to see that our grassroots-powered campaign is being fueled by hundreds of thousands of supporters chipping in whatever they can — even if it's just a few bucks at a time.
**However, this slight decline means that we need to make up some crucial ground ahead of our Q2 deadline next week by recruiting more supporters to chip in for the very first time.**
**[_Peter, will you donate for the very first time today by chipping in either $5 or our average Q2 donation of $21.47? The way we're going to elect John Fetterman to the Senate is by building a giant grassroots campaign — one donation at a time._](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20798?refcode=em20210621-1806&t=3&akid=1806%2E434096%2E7EvMRV)**
Trust us on this, Peter: It's not lost on John that even $21.47 is no small deal for a lot of folks on this team.
He knows that's hard-earned money that could just as easily be spent on bills, groceries, or even a few cups of coffee at Sheetz.
But that's why he's so grateful for every single donation to our campaign, large or small. It means the world to John to know that we're going to win this race the right way: By building a true grassroots-powered movement for all of PA's 67 counties.
**When you make a donation to our campaign — like $21.47, our average donation this quarter — you’re making a stake in our race to elect John Fetterman to the U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania.**[**_So, will you make your first donation of $21.47 or another amount to our campaign today?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20798?refcode=em20210621-1806&t=4&akid=1806%2E434096%2E7EvMRV)
**[Donate $21.47](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20798?refcode=em20210621-1806&t=23&akid=1806%2E434096%2E7EvMRV)**
John is really counting on grassroots donors like you to come through, and we wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important! 🙏
As always, THANK YOU!
Team Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210621-1806-footer&t=24&refcode2=1806_434096_7EvMRV&akid=1806%2E434096%2E7EvMRV)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=25&akid=1806%2E434096%2E7EvMRV)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=1806%2E434096%2E7EvMRV)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

subject: Marco Rubio is already attacking me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
Before midnight, I need to build a grassroots movement that can fight back | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31179694/291846134/298981188?refcode=20210621_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzY1Mjg1Zi1lOGQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HuBEuyAcrxfkvJlSTIOWzmoGT6JzfI2gcljy1jFxH4E=) Marco Rubio is already attacking me, friend. First in a primetime interview with Fox News host Sean Hannity and now on Twitter, Rubio is taking pages out of his idol Donald Trump's playbook: Divisive rhetoric. Misrepresentations about me. Far-right talking points. He even said he'd "absolutely" welcome the twice-impeached former president on the campaign trail. This is what we're up against, friend, and it's only the beginning. The worst part is that with Senate control on the line, the full force of the GOP establishment and their dark money allies will pour millions into Florida to prop up Marco Rubio, and Trump will be fanning the flames every step of the way. **That's why we've got to build a grassroots movement that can fight back, here and now, and all the way to the finish line. But we're still falling short of the number of Founding Donors we'd hoped to have at this point.** [**With the attacks already beginning, we can't afford shortfalls like this, so can I count on you to split a donation between Seth Moulton and me of $10 or more right now? Every dollar you contribute helps us build the strongest campaign possible to defeat Marco Rubio and protect our Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31179698/291846137/298981188?refcode=20210621_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzY1Mjg1Zi1lOGQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HuBEuyAcrxfkvJlSTIOWzmoGT6JzfI2gcljy1jFxH4E=) Thanks for stepping up and having my back from the very beginning, friend. I have so much faith in this team. Together, we can deliver better leadership for Floridians and defend our majority in the Senate. Val Demings First in a primetime interview with Fox News host Sean Hannity and now on Twitter, Rubio is taking pages out of his idol Donald Trump's playbook: Divisive rhetoric. Misrepresentations about me. Far-right talking points. He even said he'd "absolutely" welcome the twice-impeached former president on the campaign trail. This is what we're up against, friend, and it's only the beginning. The worst part is that with Senate control on the line, the full force of the GOP establishment and their dark money allies will pour millions into Florida to prop up Marco Rubio, and Trump will be fanning the flames every step of the way. That's why we've got to build a grassroots movement that can fight back, here and now, and all the way to the finish line. But we're still falling short of the number of Founding Donors we'd hoped to have at this point. = Thanks for stepping up and having my back from the very beginning, friend. I have so much faith in this team. Together, we can deliver better leadership for Floridians and defend our majority in the Senate. Dear Peter,
Last week, we had two huge victories in Court, but also fell on the short end of the stick on the Obamacare case.
_We obtained a major nationwide injunction against the Biden Administration_ related to oil-and-gas production on federal lands, _prevailed in a huge religious liberty case_ , and unfortunately saw the high court duck the question about the constitutionality of the individual mandate.
This week, we are pushing hard on multiple fronts. First, _we are rallying many people to convince the U.S. Senate to oppose S. 1_ , the bill which advances the federal takeover of elections. Second, we are all in to _oppose the confirmation of David Chipman_ , to serve as director of the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, and Firearms. 21 state chief legal officers oppose his nomination.

| | Amanda Chase is going all-in for Glenn Youngkin. This weekend, she campaigned side by side with him and said she had “a special love in my heart” for the Trump-endorsed Youngkin.

**[Derek, we can’t let Trump-backed extremists take Virginia back. Will you donate now and help us stop Amanda Chase and Glenn Youngkin?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31180394/291847587/1097049879?refcode=20210621.3_TM_6CT-A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTlmMzcwNi1lYmQyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YuL3muIQMs3TMbybQRHd11QomFJH-sRpgPTTZIxODEU=)**

Campaigning together isn’t the only thing Amanda Chase and Glenn Youngkin have in common. They both hate the Affordable Care Act and love the NRA.

They both worship Donald Trump and have aggressively pushed his “big lie” about Joe Biden stealing the election. Chase even spoke at the Trump rally that led to the January 6th insurrection!

Look, Amanda Chase didn’t win the Republican primary, but Glenn Youngkin did, and now he’s pushing the same radical agenda she was.

Fellow American,

Our worst fears may be one step closer to becoming a Reality. The “Centrist” Democrat from West Virginia, Joe Manchin, flubbed up on a call with billionaire donors and let it be known that he is in favor of reforming the Senate filibuster.

Now, he’s opened the door to reducing the 60-vote threshold to 55 votes!

Before too long, he might concede to Chuck Schumer and agree to nuke the filibuster altogether.

Fellow American, we need to mobilize quickly. We’re setting up a fund to run ads against Senate Democrats and save the filibuster.

name: Wendy Rogers
subject: Important Arizona Audit Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WENDY ROGERS FOR AZ SENATE
body:
Important information |
---
| | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57777053:Jt7AuKlMN:m:1:3253819041:994BD7B5ADFD018A26420DD7386C17B1:r)
---
| Hi Peter,

I walked the floor for three hours at the Arizona Audit, and I have some things to say.

First, let me say that the media wouldn't know the truth if they were hit over the head with it. The scope of their misreporting has been borderline legally actionable.

Second, Katie Hobbs is an inveterate liar whose incompetence and fraud are being revealed through this audit.

Third, anyone who still trusts the Dominion voting machines at this point, either wants fraud or is too lazy to hand count the ballots.

I am Senator Wendy Rogers, the Arizona State Senator who was a pivotal vote for the audit. I have been to the audit and I wanted to share the REAL scoop with you. **[Can you help me get the truth out so people understand what's REALLY happening at the audit?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57777053:Jt7AuKlMN:m:1:3253819041:994BD7B5ADFD018A26420DD7386C17B1:r)**
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57777053:Jt7AuKlMN:m:1:3253819041:994BD7B5ADFD018A26420DD7386C17B1:r)
---
| _**Here are some of my takeaways from the tour of the audit yesterday:**_

There has been an increase in capacity now:

From 17 to 32 paper inspection tables using microscopic cameras;
From 20 to 44 counting tables (yellow, green, blue);
From 4 to 12 aggregation tables.

The pace is picking up daily, with more audit forensics done each day. This process will be done soon!

Theoretically, mail-in ballots should all be of the same type, composition, and fiber with little to no variance. So if variances ARE seen, there should be an explanation; if there is no explanation, then that is a gap.

_These are issues we can address with additional future legislation._

703 precincts were condensed down to 175 precincts. Every precinct has different ballots. Thus, if your ballot was "printed on demand", then the paper in those situations could legitimately vary... but the paper should not vary for mail-in ballots.

We now DO finally have the deleted databases folder that was missing for some time.

1\. Despite news accounts, it really WAS deleted. The media got this wrong, shockingly.
2\. It was CyFIR who discovered this, and they are none other than the firm who discovered the June 2015 U.S. Government Office of Personnel Management (OPM) breach, where SF86 forms used for Top Secret security clearances were compromised. The bad guys had been infiltrated into OPM for three years.
3\. Here is the reason that the databases are important:

Let's say a ballot box's pink slip says there are 200 ballots contained in the box. Really, only 99 physical ballots are actually IN the box (yes this is happening a LOT).

There should be TWO cross-references to verify this. The Dominion machine would have a batch number corresponding to that grouping of ballots AND Dominion should have the scanned imagery to similarly correlate to those ballots. Where are the remaining 101 ballots? Are they imaged in Dominion? Is their batch number tallied in Dominion? That's why we need the databases.

Noteworthy that both Dominion and Secretary Hobbs have declined the invitation to observe the audit, however everything is still being video recorded.

_Now, will the AZ Audit be enough?_

Yes, because it will inform legislation necessary to plug the gaps to restore the public's confidence. That is the reason the Arizona Senate is doing this, so we know the loopholes and can close them.

There was a helpful debrief from the Cyber Ninjas CEO. Here are the highlights:

1\. This has never been done before.
2\. It's really important for our democracy to be transparent.
3\. Unfortunately, technology has gotten in the way rather than helping.
4\. Where will we be if voters think their votes don't matter anymore?
5\. We have a solid AZ Audit team that is ready and capable to get it done.
6\. This is a calling. We will overcome any and every obstacle.
7\. He can't wait till it's over so that the participants can talk all they want about what they've seen!
8\. Physical data collection will be completed by the end of June. The report will follow sometime later.

I was also able to speak with a floor volunteer who is a retired USAF pilot. Here's what he had to say:

1\. Chain of custody procedures are as precise and flawless as Strategic Air Command's. Signing off of authenticators' "secrets" was not as stringent as the AZ Audit! Going to the bathroom for 10 minutes requires a sign-off.
2\. Laughable that the AZ Secretary of State said her machines were compromised when she initially said they were unhackable.

Here are the procedures on the floor:
1\. All volunteer counters must be from Maricopa county and have voted in the November 2020 election (they must have skin in the game).
2\. Tally sheets and ballots can physically move only if 3 things are present:
People
Paper
Camera
3\. Three components to the AZ Audit layout: Counting - Aggregation - Forensics.
4\. Every worker treats the process on the floor as if he were in a court of law.

As you can see, and I could verify with my own two eyes, this audit is being carried out with the greatest of care and by true professionals who know what they are doing and care about our democratic processes.

The transparency here has been remarkable. Every citizen can visit the video feed and witness what's going on.

_**The best practices being developed here can be used for future audits, such as those being considered in Wisconsin, Pennsylvania, Georgia, and other states. **_
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57777053:Jt7AuKlMN:m:1:3253819041:994BD7B5ADFD018A26420DD7386C17B1:r)
---
| We knew there was something wrong with the 2020 election at the beginning of this process. Already we are troubled by several issues and discrepancies that need to be sorted out.

I'm so glad we did this audit! But it only happened because I won my seat in a swing district!

**I'm thrilled to see movements for audits in Wisconsin, Pennsylvania, Georgia, and other places. They can use the procedures we developed for the Arizona audit!**

_The machines are a problem. The procedures were faulty. We clearly have work ahead of us to guarantee election integrity in Arizona._

[Stand with me so we can finish the job!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57777053:Jt7AuKlMN:m:1:3253819041:994BD7B5ADFD018A26420DD7386C17B1:r)

_I am bringing you updates because we know the worthless media will not. I want you to know the truth- the media only wants to shill for the leftist Democrats._

[Help me fight!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57777053:Jt7AuKlMN:m:1:3253819041:994BD7B5ADFD018A26420DD7386C17B1:r) \- Help me keep my seat so we can see this process through, together!

Thank you and God bless you.
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57777053:Jt7AuKlMN:m:1:3253819041:994BD7B5ADFD018A26420DD7386C17B1:r)
---

Arizona State Senator
Arizona's 6th Legislative District

clean_body: Important information | | | | Hi Peter, I walked the floor for three hours at the Arizona Audit, and I have some things to say. First, let me say that the media wouldn't know the truth if they were hit over the head with it. The scope of their misreporting has been borderline legally actionable. Second, Katie Hobbs is an inveterate liar whose incompetence and fraud are being revealed through this audit. Third, anyone who still trusts the Dominion voting machines at this point, either wants fraud or is too lazy to hand count the ballots. I am Senator Wendy Rogers, the Arizona State Senator who was a pivotal vote for the audit. I have been to the audit and I wanted to share the REAL scoop with you. | | Here are some of my takeaways from the tour of the audit yesterday: There has been an increase in capacity now: From 17 to 32 paper inspection tables using microscopic cameras; From 20 to 44 counting tables (yellow, green, blue); From 4 to 12 aggregation tables. The pace is picking up daily, with more audit forensics done each day. This process will be done soon! Theoretically, mail-in ballots should all be of the same type, composition, and fiber with little to no variance. So if variances ARE seen, there should be an explanation; if there is no explanation, then that is a gap. These are issues we can address with additional future legislation. 703 precincts were condensed down to 175 precincts. Every precinct has different ballots. Thus, if your ballot was "printed on demand", then the paper in those situations could legitimately vary... but the paper should not vary for mail-in ballots. We now DO finally have the deleted databases folder that was missing for some time. 1\. Despite news accounts, it really WAS deleted. The media got this wrong, shockingly. 2\. It was CyFIR who discovered this, and they are none other than the firm who discovered the June 2015 U.S. Government Office of Personnel Management (OPM) breach, where SF86 forms used for Top Secret security clearances were compromised. The bad guys had been infiltrated into OPM for three years. 3\. Here is the reason that the databases are important: Let's say a ballot box's pink slip says there are 200 ballots contained in the box. Really, only 99 physical ballots are actually IN the box (yes this is happening a LOT). There should be TWO cross-references to verify this. The Dominion machine would have a batch number corresponding to that grouping of ballots AND Dominion should have the scanned imagery to similarly correlate to those ballots. Where are the remaining 101 ballots? Are they imaged in Dominion? Is their batch number tallied in Dominion? That's why we need the databases. Noteworthy that both Dominion and Secretary Hobbs have declined the invitation to observe the audit, however everything is still being video recorded. Now, will the AZ Audit be enough? Yes, because it will inform legislation necessary to plug the gaps to restore the public's confidence. That is the reason the Arizona Senate is doing this, so we know the loopholes and can close them. There was a helpful debrief from the Cyber Ninjas CEO. Here are the highlights: 1\. This has never been done before. 2\. It's really important for our democracy to be transparent. 3\. Unfortunately, technology has gotten in the way rather than helping. 4\. Where will we be if voters think their votes don't matter anymore? 5\. We have a solid AZ Audit team that is ready and capable to get it done. 6\. This is a calling. We will overcome any and every obstacle. 7\. He can't wait till it's over so that the participants can talk all they want about what they've seen! 8\. Physical data collection will be completed by the end of June. The report will follow sometime later. I was also able to speak with a floor volunteer who is a retired USAF pilot. Here's what he had to say: 1\. Chain of custody procedures are as precise and flawless as Strategic Air Command's. Signing off of authenticators' "secrets" was not as stringent as the AZ Audit! Going to the bathroom for 10 minutes requires a sign-off. 2\. Laughable that the AZ Secretary of State said her machines were compromised when she initially said they were unhackable. Here are the procedures on the floor: 1\. All volunteer counters must be from Maricopa county and have voted in the November 2020 election (they must have skin in the game). 2\. Tally sheets and ballots can physically move only if 3 things are present: People Paper Camera 3\. Three components to the AZ Audit layout: Counting - Aggregation - Forensics. 4\. Every worker treats the process on the floor as if he were in a court of law. As you can see, and I could verify with my own two eyes, this audit is being carried out with the greatest of care and by true professionals who know what they are doing and care about our democratic processes. The transparency here has been remarkable. Every citizen can visit the video feed and witness what's going on. The best practices being developed here can be used for future audits, such as those being considered in Wisconsin, Pennsylvania, Georgia, and other states. | | We knew there was something wrong with the 2020 election at the beginning of this process. Already we are troubled by several issues and discrepancies that need to be sorted out. I'm so glad we did this audit! But it only happened because I won my seat in a swing district! I'm thrilled to see movements for audits in Wisconsin, Pennsylvania, Georgia, and other places. They can use the procedures we developed for the Arizona audit! The machines are a problem. The procedures were faulty. We clearly have work ahead of us to guarantee election integrity in Arizona. I am bringing you updates because we know the worthless media will not. I want you to know the truth- the media only wants to shill for the leftist Democrats. \- Help me keep my seat so we can see this process through, together! Thank you and God bless you. | | Wendy Rogers, Lt Col USAF (ret) Arizona State Senator Arizona's 6th Legislative District | | P.S. I am fighting hard to fulfill my campaign promises. I am taking a lot of heat but I don't care. Thank you. PAID FOR BY WENDY ROGERS FOR AZ SENATE Wendy Rogers is a retired member of the Air Force. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense. | | | Copyright(C) 2021 Wendy Rogers for AZ Senate, All rights reserved. body:
|
---

| | Peter: Our pressure campaign is working! **NBC: Manchin proposes compromise on voting bills ahead of crucial Senate vote** Joe Manchin felt the pressure at home \-- and he's FINALLY starting to understand that Democrats have to take action to save democracy from Republican voter suppression. | **[HELP KEEP UP THE PRESSURE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31181652/291860496/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210621_GEN_FDR_L&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5ZDVhNDAwLWYxZDItZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4E7wwLyiJJoknxU5VMkPLVhlsEe6JV4iarHSsl5wxUI=)**
---

**Manchin's proposals don't include everything we need, but this is a start \-- and Stacey Abrams has announced her support!** **[**We need your help to push this forward.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31181654/291860498/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210621_GEN_FDR_L&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5ZDVhNDAwLWYxZDItZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4E7wwLyiJJoknxU5VMkPLVhlsEe6JV4iarHSsl5wxUI=)**

name: Mike Carey
subject: President Trump says “YES” 👍

body:
My name is Mike Carey. I stood with President Trump when he fought career politicians who wouldn’t put America First. | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=fcab030f61b5417ba096042d66fd6722&_e=SiuLJo4OUbFr1hSDD7tuM_2iVWpYAM2TDqHkNj3fukQgZKY0QmrolWkXsdZkhhdageh1LbvEuP3W0aROIA9CEIj43xlWrTJdQ-CmxHo3jrHxhuEn9BdfYBRiORd50Cs1B8rChEkitDrWfbEBK_U6uM94-nmjXKjDetxTsf0mtDr00lvYPbW8H9atJj2x4dbNaI_ps_8XUBIMo0AJnCEpvPrngosGPVtmkWzjSZccj7a0lNMsbTmTfPyO7IDdUNCVB9xOQvRxmmv2Bnn82IyR1A4pK_uNJysDAHrrx2OjpWxflLcOX_n4NyNqlv_ofkozjqBcWc4yePIfWrx52NHpt5dhooLvd4KJuY2J4Jc0Ify8A9CHS0htwF4IuUSVA6r1)

---
Fellow Conservative,

My name is Mike Carey. I stood with President Trump when he fought career politicians who wouldn’t put America First.

Now I’m honored that President Trump is standing with me by endorsing my campaign to represent YOU in Congress.

I grew up in Sabina, right here in the district. My hometown molded me into the person I am today. I started my own hay bailing business as a kid, served as an officer in the Army National Guard and have had a 20+ year career in the American energy industry. I’ve always stood for American values and American jobs.

And now, most importantly, [**here’s why I want to represent our district in Washington:**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=fcab030f61b5417ba096042d66fd6722&_e=SiuLJo4OUbFr1hSDD7tuM_2iVWpYAM2TDqHkNj3fukQgZKY0QmrolWkXsdZkhhdageh1LbvEuP3W0aROIA9CEIj43xlWrTJdQ-CmxHo3jrHxhuEn9BdfYBRiORd50Cs1B8rChEkitDrWfbEBK_U6uM94-nmjXKjDetxTsf0mtDq9KTPdRM34Le3O7IsIHApmGbcbF3YK3at8qmRN6tec65NuXFHI0_RLXgodA1zp0pt-ZR-a5CZVTUihMZSPwQUg016obM5ETqAPWpHgxsuCVBOch2MCHg7XfET7XaUcs2UqTMSYzKOIgeiDRbOPUv8xVQOHEDI64tANBblwIItW03nRPYCkGCs4U1AadMqFqynZARXtSYaPr0uThXjMqnkc)
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=fcab030f61b5417ba096042d66fd6722&_e=SiuLJo4OUbFr1hSDD7tuM_2iVWpYAM2TDqHkNj3fukQgZKY0QmrolWkXsdZkhhdageh1LbvEuP3W0aROIA9CEIj43xlWrTJdQ-CmxHo3jrHxhuEn9BdfYBRiORd50Cs1B8rChEkitDrWfbEBK_U6uM94-nmjXKjDetxTsf0mtDqKPc8k5mWdFeK02V9BI3kYMqnOb1JsUjmJCMn_A4Q_hgvRx7KyPN2PQIoD5tqzA18N_69kDSrRikH0AHosJL8uycbNZMKZgJV1qfEqW6DArXxZ-OBzp8veXPVhU5-wkX6hcLCyFfq74fOg_36I3vuL4DZPdswgsjf7Bk5dt9OeLSISC5qTD2PIPlruU5PxCpBTHPZkfKvnLuWaAgW73CEc)

This election will have wide ranging national implications. It will be viewed as a bell-weather referendum on the failed Biden-Pelosi policies that are driving up inflation, gas and food prices and killing good paying jobs.

The forgotten men and women who President Trump fought for are being left behind once again by destructive socialist policies. As your next Congressman, you can bet I’ll fight like hell to:

* Put America First
* Lower taxes and cut red tape
* Demand fair trade deals
* Invest in our military and our police
* Finish building the Wall
* Defend Life and The Second Amendment
* STOP reckless Democrat spending

Today, [**I’m asking for your support as the first step to bringing President Trump’s America First Agenda back to Washington.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=fcab030f61b5417ba096042d66fd6722&_e=SiuLJo4OUbFr1hSDD7tuM_2iVWpYAM2TDqHkNj3fukQgZKY0QmrolWkXsdZkhhdageh1LbvEuP3W0aROIA9CEIj43xlWrTJdQ-CmxHo3jrHxhuEn9BdfYBRiORd50Cs1B8rChEkitDrWfbEBK_U6uM94-nmjXKjDetxTsf0mtDq_HHK9Lln94VnFGhGEQxqZBPUHGPL8fV0E8IIEHFpH5C91QDtqsTGSKSrk0uxGOxx9W55od29kWre9vaArYPle6AKNfOpbQKGq-05p50Cg_69DD8UjUSEA6bhi_-JQwJM2QP1OiNY-T5FFPYRO-bzfATV_6yIRHXVsBXC4Nt_CM2998I6OCA1h2OiBjtggTUOXm6dyxMU_iAVNUqxUk7Li)

| [DONATE](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=fcab030f61b5417ba096042d66fd6722&_e=SiuLJo4OUbFr1hSDD7tuM_2iVWpYAM2TDqHkNj3fukQgZKY0QmrolWkXsdZkhhdageh1LbvEuP3W0aROIA9CEIj43xlWrTJdQ-CmxHo3jrHxhuEn9BdfYBRiORd50Cs1B8rChEkitDrWfbEBK_U6uM94-nmjXKjDetxTsf0mtDpOk4WYDybfVxXRbjnPlyV3sUTSp8bpLaW0yTg3X8WHzyple0KlT1nt0Pq8CBLPmu0TaS5txU9fUIlBZWROoNf_EVEt0wXdH0yKRzjSEwYYA-17tmq0i19Q5jAS7IqbdsL1JTtaRzAj-XFWLfWUDRD9rhsQE3XbhsVfUHDeQ3KRctmuErePjt6vLU_g7VsKeSKuLgcPy_5GqGbRSdwygcRQ)

This election is our chance to send a LOUD AND CLEAR national message that heartland Americans have already had enough of the failed Biden Administration and we are TAKING OUR COUNTRY BACK!

Because this is such a closely watched race, money will be pouring in from radical democrat groups to defeat me. I fully expect to be on the receiving end of the same hateful attacks that were aimed at President Trump for 4 years – and continue today.

[**With your support, I will be fully prepared to FIGHT BACK against those attacks because this race is far too important for the future of our district, our state and our nation.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=fcab030f61b5417ba096042d66fd6722&_e=SiuLJo4OUbFr1hSDD7tuM_2iVWpYAM2TDqHkNj3fukQgZKY0QmrolWkXsdZkhhdageh1LbvEuP3W0aROIA9CEIj43xlWrTJdQ-CmxHo3jrHxhuEn9BdfYBRiORd50Cs1B8rChEkitDrWfbEBK_U6uM94-nmjXKjDetxTsf0mtDpc-psFgc3Acy0zs-nI0vl6De7UYVdcH9QiIYexsgZbnU_Nculwb0xOTzUhHNXf_vfdLUk40d7GoImqwjOkYyrOdrzw9yxNRDTFRjl3XEDxlTYkrdBozWHhSOdIG5iJXgIoimW-NONm0XW3d96e2SwlyF9TVAkK-OrF_4SMDgT2CaYZzkrbTakbwaOxDL9iTcFXzfyZ6pGiQ3bz_xdKiFAh)

We can’t wait until August or November to save our country. [**The hard work must begin today and Fellow Conservative I need you on my team.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=fcab030f61b5417ba096042d66fd6722&_e=SiuLJo4OUbFr1hSDD7tuM_2iVWpYAM2TDqHkNj3fukQgZKY0QmrolWkXsdZkhhdageh1LbvEuP3W0aROIA9CEIj43xlWrTJdQ-CmxHo3jrHxhuEn9BdfYBRiORd50Cs1B8rChEkitDrWfbEBK_U6uM94-nmjXKjDetxTsf0mtDr2YpGdH9W74LAgQrvVEdN4g3-a35Oz48x4TN_2nK_eVr7mhOlL6B0Zh5-V8upQiQ1wXnElCa3otA5-VOUDDbF0SChdU6gDY29BqTkX1JUCoTGeD3rXu44lWqFcZCTjs72HnETCgdNlkYJM786Mpg7C9FVliW_Tw5PcFgtPMwGzywnQ1kcQb01wCX9isUt78o6nKVgkUtvXOvlJEZ89pi10)

clean_body: My name is Mike Carey. I stood with President Trump when he fought career politicians who wouldn’t put America First. | Fellow Conservative, My name is Mike Carey. I stood with President Trump when he fought career politicians who wouldn’t put America First. Now I’m honored that President Trump is standing with me by endorsing my campaign to represent YOU in Congress. I grew up in Sabina, right here in the district. My hometown molded me into the person I am today. I started my own hay bailing business as a kid, served as an officer in the Army National Guard and have had a 20+ year career in the American energy industry. I’ve always stood for American values and American jobs. And now, most importantly, This election will have wide ranging national implications. It will be viewed as a bell-weather referendum on the failed Biden-Pelosi policies that are driving up inflation, gas and food prices and killing good paying jobs. The forgotten men and women who President Trump fought for are being left behind once again by destructive socialist policies. As your next Congressman, you can bet I’ll fight like hell to: Put America First Lower taxes and cut red tape Demand fair trade deals Invest in our military and our police Finish building the Wall Defend Life and The Second Amendment STOP reckless Democrat spending Today, | This election is our chance to send a LOUD AND CLEAR national message that heartland Americans have already had enough of the failed Biden Administration and we are TAKING OUR COUNTRY BACK! Because this is such a closely watched race, money will be pouring in from radical democrat groups to defeat me. I fully expect to be on the receiving end of the same hateful attacks that were aimed at President Trump for 4 years – and continue today. Like you I so much appreciate all the progress for America that was made during President Trump’s term. Now you and I have the opportunity to advance the America First agenda to new heights, and REJECT the destructive socialist policies of Biden and Pelosi. We can’t wait until August or November to save our country. In Freedom, Mike Carey | | Paid for by Carey for Congress P.O. Box 16032 Columbus, OH 43216** Don't want to receive any more of our emails? Peter,
I was among the many who were shocked and concerned when Dr. Fauci proclaimed that “attacks on me quite frankly are attacks on science.”

Instead of apologizing and operating like the public servant he is, Fauci **DOUBLED DOWN** \- on his ego!

Over the weekend Fauci said, “It is essential as a scientist that you evolve your opinion and your recommendations based on the data as it evolves...and that’s the reason why I say people who then criticize me about that are actually criticizing science.”

What a vain and arrogant mindset!

Dr. Fauci has lost public confidence, and he should do what’s best for the nation and resign.
