name: Laura Loomer
subject: Truth about the “Big Tent” Party
disclaimer_text: paid for by Big Tech
body:
Republican Party leadership wants a "Big Tent" Party. That means they are going to play to the center and push out anyone that the middle-of-the-road voter would find offensive.
| | | [](https://washington.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/mX2kGL892kTrbOgJ763N7OqOAA/l0LTQqlXstAAKH9XVB2u2A)
Patriot,

[](https://washington.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/mX2kGL892kTrbOgJ763N7OqOAA/l0LTQqlXstAAKH9XVB2u2A) Republican Party leadership wants a "Big Tent" Party.

That means they are going to play to the center and push out anyone who they think the middle-of-the-road voter would find "offensive".

The strategy is no different than what we see with the policies of Facebook and Twitter - keep everyone happy and silence the America First "disruptors". As an American First candidate, I will not be bought and paid for by Big Tech. Sadly the establishment leadership in the GOP can't say the same thing, and we can't allow this to continue.

They clearly aren't students of history . . .
* The "disruptors" blaze the trails toward progress.

* We stop the slide of decline.

* The "disruptors" are the ones who ALWAYS end up being the winners in the end.

[**Help me disrupt Congress by bringing back constitutional conservative values to GOP.**](https://washington.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/mX2kGL892kTrbOgJ763N7OqOAA/l0LTQqlXstAAKH9XVB2u2A)

There are ten days left until the end of the quarter!

We have $55,000 left to raise to hit our goal . . . and we're falling behind.

[**Please donate as much as you can to support my run for Congress.**](https://washington.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/mX2kGL892kTrbOgJ763N7OqOAA/l0LTQqlXstAAKH9XVB2u2A)

Will you be one of 1,000 patriots who [**will donate $55 right now?**](https://washington.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/W45YP8uSugfCezwJIDEJeg/l0LTQqlXstAAKH9XVB2u2A)

Or meet me halfway and [**donate $27.50**](https://washington.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/mX2kGL892kTrbOgJ763N7OqOAA/l0LTQqlXstAAKH9XVB2u2A) . . . every dollar gets us closer to the goal.

Thanks so much for your time and support.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. We need to send a message to the Leftist Media AND our own Establishment Leaders in the GOP . . . we want clear direction that puts America First! We don't want "Big Tent" pandering that puts the RINO's in charge. [**Join me in disrupting Congress by supporting my campaign.**](https://washington.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/mX2kGL892kTrbOgJ763N7OqOAA/l0LTQqlXstAAKH9XVB2u2A)

clean_body: I know you do. Friend, I trust you know that I'm fighting every second of every day to SAVE AMERICA. I'm doing it because I truly love America too much to watch it turn into a SOCIALIST NATION at the hands of Joe Biden and the radical Left. Every time I see another Patriot make a contribution to stand with me and save our Country, I 'm inspired to fight EVEN harder for you. I'm really counting on YOU to step up and make a contribution to help me DEFEND AMERICA. I expect to see your name on the next donor list, Friend. Thank you, Donald J. body:
My name is Mike Carey. I stood with President Trump when he fought career politicians who wouldn’t put America First. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9dffde2f746441eead2df6c7299da506&_e=l4QC3ZwlPw8iQMvYwlZ-xixLEHif7FVsjdWPHFZfBGdwnYUIg4daxNKWQ6qktGqEh9zPXhZwqIWFyExgHPlEDt5yQuQMQosKPcg4XYw2xh8mPutOcBWfvOvyxuIIzOCLRbuPgj57HM6Hm88oSTjFmHcICD5JXc5FM3SUN7FITLYfnojVC_L29iYdOE_VEBq0VKYMs8Yd3aKq3_umeMYA6JW-4D1jh9G7uMiS6bBf2Cy1X_PXChyT8Z27OoYovZ_GhsOmEaMS9Pd7xEFWXW2pxbMOY__7vdGPdE1yHMBmtdnYBMl67zHTlDhabymYRq45gGpfcUV8swe5fMu49ZUV_JFqCcepgzsam6BM9wUXtvQ2I3DYCaKfWWxb8fHQD7Xx)

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Mike Carey. I stood with President Trump when he fought career politicians who wouldn’t put America First.

Now I’m honored that President Trump is standing with me by endorsing my campaign to represent YOU in Congress.

I grew up in Sabina, right here in the district. My hometown molded me into the person I am today. I started my own hay bailing business as a kid, served as an officer in the Army National Guard and have had a 20+ year career in the American energy industry. I’ve always stood for American values and American jobs.

And now, most importantly, [**here’s why I want to represent our district in Washington:**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9dffde2f746441eead2df6c7299da506&_e=l4QC3ZwlPw8iQMvYwlZ-xixLEHif7FVsjdWPHFZfBGdwnYUIg4daxNKWQ6qktGqEh9zPXhZwqIWFyExgHPlEDt5yQuQMQosKPcg4XYw2xh8mPutOcBWfvOvyxuIIzOCLRbuPgj57HM6Hm88oSTjFmHcICD5JXc5FM3SUN7FITLY-KtzH9EUtwiS6UCCEfKIHynDIjAfmHKxMJpR_urbmHkKX7Ga-EF6kq_TlEYVA6nKNXUHiZTWXI6fOSB5Cbl1dnxU08nDUiGT2ITPi36XO0NXHwpL0PUwSfaOlH-f1vHFNuF0R0biUDnv1SxUFmKsgRgUqav5-9vZgtswrEwgv6tjBVz-Tzac-pXFYfxQm_fmkhZStT4JmpB71lNZS4I8P)
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9dffde2f746441eead2df6c7299da506&_e=l4QC3ZwlPw8iQMvYwlZ-xixLEHif7FVsjdWPHFZfBGdwnYUIg4daxNKWQ6qktGqEh9zPXhZwqIWFyExgHPlEDt5yQuQMQosKPcg4XYw2xh8mPutOcBWfvOvyxuIIzOCLRbuPgj57HM6Hm88oSTjFmHcICD5JXc5FM3SUN7FITLayi-FrutWKEjkUCE9V3B4XrpZfHbuQJkMxWrxe0Yasc_sDd6-A5hK7uNFZpjAzUFHm2uwzdSQLmTeQ5A9TJ9C_6wkJ7hwDvtEdMyr3MxoywkIWW8YptiI4bYGfx7y81eY0r1PEph4gzCzdDdTcEHt-QgkikPPyp6aTMRolr9f8HbykTlQtd1GRXeF1r-iYAn4YFeRvvUMCxJxhxEnP3g7l)

This election will have wide ranging national implications. It will be viewed as a bell-weather referendum on the failed Biden-Pelosi policies that are driving up inflation, gas and food prices and killing good paying jobs.

The forgotten men and women who President Trump fought for are being left behind once again by destructive socialist policies. As your next Congressman, you can bet I’ll fight like hell to:

* Put America First
* Lower taxes and cut red tape
* Demand fair trade deals
* Invest in our military and our police
* Finish building the Wall
* Defend Life and The Second Amendment
* STOP reckless Democrat spending

Today, [**I’m asking for your support as the first step to bringing President Trump’s America First Agenda back to Washington.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9dffde2f746441eead2df6c7299da506&_e=l4QC3ZwlPw8iQMvYwlZ-xixLEHif7FVsjdWPHFZfBGdwnYUIg4daxNKWQ6qktGqEh9zPXhZwqIWFyExgHPlEDt5yQuQMQosKPcg4XYw2xh8mPutOcBWfvOvyxuIIzOCLRbuPgj57HM6Hm88oSTjFmHcICD5JXc5FM3SUN7FITLY12dxhIvyGCGGu9dx0o4sOLU8VNvaXCI5jt2rD6XeSrfSN4_7e53TBIcd5MwyYbDhL46wWaJVXVt33q1_U39NgTmnl5zNqQIe8l56SjaEVjm06amCXjjqYvHb1xsI_gBqxqd1_vThuKuhYq5XTP_HK0aO49gVaYeXlJjCqbKa4wO49QIiUf5obruKzJ_gGIKwTxsZJ2hwU_aECjLzxj3VS)

This election is our chance to send a LOUD AND CLEAR national message that heartland Americans have already had enough of the failed Biden Administration and we are TAKING OUR COUNTRY BACK!

Because this is such a closely watched race, money will be pouring in from radical democrat groups to defeat me. I fully expect to be on the receiving end of the same hateful attacks that were aimed at President Trump for 4 years – and continue today.

[**With your support, I will be fully prepared to FIGHT BACK against those attacks because this race is far too important for the future of our district, our state and our nation.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9dffde2f746441eead2df6c7299da506&_e=l4QC3ZwlPw8iQMvYwlZ-xixLEHif7FVsjdWPHFZfBGdwnYUIg4daxNKWQ6qktGqEh9zPXhZwqIWFyExgHPlEDt5yQuQMQosKPcg4XYw2xh8mPutOcBWfvOvyxuIIzOCLRbuPgj57HM6Hm88oSTjFmHcICD5JXc5FM3SUN7FITLZWVB_-CQnV9ZAqMpIEMCE49FrDV5WAlYVbTquke9cX9YOm-o1vl47m-eif-bAsNzxo3lKshvhsxwl23TOVNaEOPa2tzBSCQzl0GOzzAtQ0pM8cbZQqGlcxl8yO6QpS_sUtGzHz00SBCSUEskl1eCix2jJ9PMNxE2_YQ4XM9I4VgaMigDMm9ldfVqQWGGQzf2RjYghCjOV4-1dEzfJsTlzk)

| Friends, This week, the state legislature will be taking the final vote to approve **one of the most conservative budgets that NH has ever seen!** Over the weekend, the [Union Leader agreed](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNzEzMjczMDU4Nzk5NjU0ODMwJmM9ajh5MSZlPTE5MjgmYj02MzIxMjg2MjQmZD1mMnMzYjRl.lGSmXmWIbFEv1cUkIb72RCNpCVM921yma_oocSDh-9A) that "conservative legislators, and conservatives in general, should have little trouble getting behind the state budget" - see their editorial from the weekend below. If you also agree and want to show your support for the conservative state budget, please consider making a [small $5, $25 or even $100 contribution to the NH Senate Republicans here](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNzEzMjczMDU4Nzk5NjU0ODMwJmM9ajh5MSZlPTE5MjgmYj02MzIxMjg2MzYmZD1pM3o1azV6.VvSueMMasANjXf8ufmd78qxp9Lvl7IYYpjXMimqDvkY)! Thank you, NH Senate Republicans
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNzEzMjczMDU4Nzk5NjU0ODMwJmM9ajh5MSZlPTE5MjgmYj02MzIxMjg2NTQmZD10MGUydjdp.XIurGojuhQXk47TH4y0y8tObf-TQRdm2_cUj_CBrBxY)
---
| |
---
| A good NH budget: Conservative appeal
---
---
| |
---
| Conservative legislators, and conservatives in general, should have little trouble getting behind the **state budget package up for a final vote** this week. The compromise reached on emergency executive power is reasonable. It sets a firm time limit of 90 days, after which the Legislature can vote to end a governor’s declaration by a simple majority. The governor must also explain the reasons for the emergency. Legislative fiscal oversight is also required. The ban on late-term abortion is an important step, with New Hampshire finally catching up to where most states have long drawn the line on the procedure. With the U.S. Supreme Court likely to revisit the issue in the near future and with medical science making ever clearer what (or dare we say who?) is involved here, the ban better prepares the state for what may come next on this most divisive issue. The tax cuts in the budget should also be cheered by conservatives. They will add to the positive reputation New Hampshire has long enjoyed as a place where private enterprise can flourish. That will pay dividends. One objection conservatives ought to have to this budget is the creation of yet another government entity. A state Department of Energy may make sense on paper, but our guess is that the tendency of bureaucracies to grow will end up costing more than any claimed efficiencies. That, however, is not reason to oppose the budget. As Gov. Chris Sununu has said, there is much good in this budget package. It should be approved.
---

Peter,

Our worst fears may be one step closer to becoming a Reality. The “Centrist” Democrat from West Virginia, Joe Manchin, flubbed up on a call with billionaire donors and let it be known that he is in favor of reforming the Senate filibuster.

You might be asking yourself, “Didn’t he go on Fox news and commit to the American people that for the next two years he was a firm NO on filibuster reform?”

Yep – he sure did. **[Here is the clip](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=15fac069b6414fef8c4384e5cbf16b25&_e=84zl8D_05-fXbb9ZGc2YCFRq4DFamzRkmt4ZGxdwcHe8VjbCA9b3utI_NIsfSadhxshBDMpRpLFgRx_bLBvDDf2M6AprK-eNUS_q9svm2P_fP00-QNk66s3qFF82tDsbC6UqYEnfk8girTeMLaV8aVqu-nc4wPJqbKE5xQN-UkbIf8pEkUgGx5j2tXCT3nFHjwhD3tMIsrJo3dW_FxXSVixY8gBdW5Cez7CtCGRw2pUmg-35dCLdOXC8ENlsRnaCf1mfphm930zbR7B7kH7nIJQrwfANOTe8ZSrve3RXCVyeB3A5i0G-OCCABeJCnRwJmWncsalo6QPX72v903No8KWghOesk1JjAR_PLpipb_reIRSnBOJq4FmtdjXlypZJWkfg8Z9RKkonmLe43ccAS3zPgxIFbeEx1sacd1WcABSrA1D9pks08e7XuswLZ-o7n0zf-TwXiz_bezAOavBkUA%3D%3D)** :

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=15fac069b6414fef8c4384e5cbf16b25&_e=84zl8D_05-fXbb9ZGc2YCFRq4DFamzRkmt4ZGxdwcHe8VjbCA9b3utI_NIsfSadhxshBDMpRpLFgRx_bLBvDDf2M6AprK-eNUS_q9svm2P_fP00-QNk66s3qFF82tDsbC6UqYEnfk8girTeMLaV8aVqu-nc4wPJqbKE5xQN-UkbIf8pEkUgGx5j2tXCT3nFHjwhD3tMIsrJo3dW_FxXSVixY8gBdW5Cez7CtCGRw2pUmg-35dCLdOXC8ENlsRnaCyybjtx3msSSqGDiTN1OFtXAaibhvlqy4zYyJ1K5aEEhKPNM6MxQktq4z-JbSp0NdZpEsYnMGnCCoLyY635r1aKuNbLYYCAryM9AHFHotD_mZcDeZHZYn6k8R93HbVgTREGwiQd-6zMO3QEI0P9IfH9uem3_UKpdZV7MRrD_vXLfhCQ9YCGs_znb44253NUNxJLFIfgxa3PnVC8Vv_Y7EDA%3D%3D)
| [**WATCH
Manchin On The Record ** **› › **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=15fac069b6414fef8c4384e5cbf16b25&_e=84zl8D_05-fXbb9ZGc2YCFRq4DFamzRkmt4ZGxdwcHe8VjbCA9b3utI_NIsfSadhxshBDMpRpLFgRx_bLBvDDf2M6AprK-eNUS_q9svm2P_fP00-QNk66s3qFF82tDsbC6UqYEnfk8girTeMLaV8aVqu-nc4wPJqbKE5xQN-UkbIf8pEkUgGx5j2tXCT3nFHjwhD3tMIsrJo3dW_FxXSVixY8gBdW5Cez7CtCGRw2pUmg-35dCLdOXC8ENlsRnaCha4LB6R5zlZg9YRk0aaZcReflol2jow2eLFi8MzCmjdAKDHZNYMoRZ9efg0-OlFCTanKEIpYju-cJ-j0_UOVFDRd-B6MODlL6NUDQMp7N8FMizNBKQiJT3suo2_ThB5TZqK6x1V0lMi0fVfAOqxSq-MTWFHwioeyc9GpoSDM0mheJL3UY6a48LqSysLEiF3OKyTDNlfy_w0APLzLCKYTLw%3D%3D)

First, Manchin was a hard “no” on filibuster reform

Now, he’s opened the door to reducing the 60-vote threshold to 55 votes!

Before too long, he might concede to Chuck Schumer and agree to nuke the filibuster altogether.

Peter, we need to mobilize quickly. We’re setting up a fund to run ads against Senate Democrats and save the filibuster.

**The ads we run against Senate Democrats are going to cost, at minimum, $100,000. Can we count on you to make an emergency donation of $5, $50 or even $500 today to fund this project?**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=15fac069b6414fef8c4384e5cbf16b25&_e=84zl8D_05-fXbb9ZGc2YCFRq4DFamzRkmt4ZGxdwcHe8VjbCA9b3utI_NIsfSadhxshBDMpRpLFgRx_bLBvDDf2M6AprK-eNUS_q9svm2P_fP00-QNk66s3qFF82tDsbC6UqYEnfk8girTeMLaV8aVqu-nc4wPJqbKE5xQN-UkbIf8pEkUgGx5j2tXCT3nFHjwhD3tMIsrJo3dW_FxXSVixY8gBdW5Cez7CtCGRw2pUmg-35dCLdOXC8ENlsRnaCGOdgnUlkE19Wf4u1HI_x9rGVAXYpsHZvzLMYG3Gplp7TAQqZHQVdR9mKN906VF_kSyTA0hFaaWR3k5fsf_A8Qxr_owr8ofpqx0QPbH43IDf7mXc_TI9jOGRejKqCV4qBsXQrw4jeGtV9CRP-KyJ4_wJa8MqaVaoEAFZg66Wq5r8oCFiEJt6sRIkhbtDbLvtI1-s3Zk1tiq72roGsMybHdw%3D%3D)
DC statehood, no IDs to vote, federalization of elections, the Green New Deal, American bankruptcy. Without the filibuster, we’re toast.

clean_body: I wish Republicans still had the Senate majority and I weren’t having to write this email to you today... I wish Republicans still had the Senate majority and I weren’t having to write this email to you today... Don't want to receive our emails? | Peter, Our worst fears may be one step closer to becoming a Reality. The “Centrist” Democrat from West Virginia, Joe Manchin, flubbed up on a call with billionaire donors and let it be known that he is in favor of reforming the Senate filibuster. You might be asking yourself, “Didn’t he go on Fox news and commit to the American people that for the next two years he was a firm NO on filibuster reform?” Yep – he sure did. : | First, Manchin was a hard “no” on filibuster reform Now, he’s opened the door to reducing the 60-vote threshold to 55 votes! Before too long, he might concede to Chuck Schumer and agree to nuke the filibuster altogether. Peter, we need to mobilize quickly. We’re setting up a fund to run ads against Senate Democrats and save the filibuster. The ads we run against Senate Democrats are going to cost, at minimum, $100,000. Can we count on you to make an emergency donation of $5, $50 or even $500 today to fund this project? DC statehood, no IDs to vote, federalization of elections, the Green New Deal, American bankruptcy. Without the filibuster, we’re toast. , but time is of the essence. We MUST start airing our ads ASAP. Senate Republicans If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Mike is unashamedly pro-life, pro-Second Amendment, and pro-America. He led efforts to make the world respect the United States once again. He stood UP to Iran, China and North Korea, and he made sure we stood strong BY our allies like Israel.

He knows what it takes to lead and get the job done.

clean_body: | | | | | "BREAKING: Trump Admin Secretary of State Mike Pompeo launches new group to support America First conservatives across the country" President Trump chose Mike Pompeo as his Secretary of State because he knows Mike is as tough as they come and a straight shooter. Mike is unashamedly pro-life, pro-Second Amendment, and pro-America. He led efforts to make the world respect the United States once again. He stood UP to Iran, China and North Korea, and he made sure we stood strong BY our allies like Israel. He knows what it takes to lead and get the job done. That 's why he's not going to sit back and let the radical Left DESTROY our country and REVERSE all the great progress he and President Trump made over the last four years. Mike is on a mission to advance the conservative agenda and champion American values, but he needs your help. He asked us to reach out to YOU personally to become a Founding Member of his new organization dedicated to Championing American Values (CAVPAC). Mike gave us a goal of enlisting 10,000 Founding Members by 11:59 tonight, and we're just short. We need your help to flip the House and Senate. Don't let Mike and America down--make sure your name is on the CAVPAC Founding Members list by making a contribution before we show Mike the final list tomorrow morning! BEFORE 11:59 TONIGHT "BECOME A FOUNDING MEMBER>>>" The momentum is on our side -- conservatives are more motivated than ever to restore values in America and get back on the path to greatness and prosperity. But the Left is willing to spend whatever it takes to make sure that never happens. Make YOUR conservative voice heard by joining Mike in his efforts to champion American values and stand up to the radical Left by making a donation today. Remember, the deadline is 11:59 tonight, and we 're showing Mike the list of Founding Members first thing in the morning - make sure he sees your name! That’s why I’m coming to Iowa to support your Congressman, Randy Feenstra. | Randy is a champion for our shared conservative values, and in Congress, he’s delivering for you. Randy has passed legislation _out of committee_ to ensure the Chinese Communist Party can’t get its hands on taxpayer-funded research, he has fought to protect life, stood strong against Biden’s wasteful spending, and he’s been to our southern border to see the border crisis firsthand. Randy is working every day for Iowa families, farmers, and main streets, but he needs your help. To win the majority we need to hold this seat. Last year Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked candidate spent almost ** _4 MILLION DOLLARS_** to win this seat – and they will try again. __Will you join me and stand with Randy?__
